-- 3 of 624 --

Magnetic Marketing Vault
The Magnetic Marketing Vault is a "newly upgraded and expanded ingredient" of
Magnetic Marketing that allows you to implement the proven principles of Magnetic
Marketing quickly, without wasting time and money on "false starts ."
The Vault contains submitted pieces from our GKIC members most successful emails,
landing pages, websites, sales letters, postcards, and direct mail campaigns that have
been most effective at attracting their ideal customers, clients, and patients. We put
everything into a special collection you can study, get ideas from , and implement quickly
in order to magnetically attract your own ideal customers, clients, and patients.
This Vault is a treasure trove of ideas for headlines, bullet points, design, stories, offers,
and positioning your product. By using it, you'll avoid having to create your marketing
from scratch-just borrow and learn from the successes of our most successful GKIC
members. Think of it as a swipe file of proven promotions that are steeped in Magnetic
Marketing principles.
To help you quickly find your business industry, you ' ll find five tabs divided by business
industries:
1. 	Business To Consumer
2. 	Professional Practice
3. 	Business To Business
4. 	Service Business
5. 	Sales
Under each tab, you'll find printed versions of both copyright-free templates and
examples of successful campaigns. These are swipe files of proven promotions that you
can legally swipe (copy) and use in your business.
Go through the pages of the proven marketing promotions, find the ones that resonate
with your business, then take a few minutes to quickly modify them for your own
business, and get them out the door.
Even the examples that are outside of your industry will be useful to you because some
of the biggest and best breakthroughs are found by searching "outside the box" of your
particular business and field . That means you should NOT discount or discard an
example simply because it isn't your industry. 	EVERY example in this system can
apply, and one "unlikely" example might be "The One" to light the biggest fire you've
ever seen in your sales. Remember nothing happens unless you Take Action and
Implement!
TIP: The Magnetic Marketing Vault copyright-free templates are available as word
documents and swipe examples are available as a digital PDF both online and on your
USB flash drive.

Section 1
Business to Consumer
Business to consumer encompasses those
businesses where the consumer is the end
user of the product and/or service.

Service Business - 	To Consumers
The Original 3-Step Giorgio Letter #1
Photo
A Confidential Letter To The
Husband Of The House From Giorgio
- Romance Director
Giorgio's Italian Grotto
COPYRIGHT-FREE
"She may be waiting .. .just anticipating ...things s he may never possess .. .
but while she's waiting, try a little tenderness. n
<Insert Date>
Dear <Insert First Name>,
Women are different than we are. (Vive' le difference!) YOUR loving wife needs, wants, and
deserves SPECIAL ATTENTION maybe more often than you think to give to her.
You are busy. Pre-occupied with work. Aggravated with that dumb-dumb that you have to deal
with every day at the office. Tired . Who has time or energy to even think about "romance"?
(Two-thirds of all marriages end in divorce and the number one reason given by divorcing
women - "He just didn't pay enough attention to me anymore .")
For you, my friend, I have got a SOLUTION !
With this letter, YOU are entitled to an evening charmed by all the creativity of Giorgio, the
Official Romance Director!
When you and your Very-Significant-Other arrive at Giorgio's, you' ll be ushered to the special
dining room - lit only by candlelight and the roaring fire in the fireplace ... with the view of the
sunset or starry night over the harbor! (When you make your reservation , I will GUARANTEE
your choice of a near-the-fireplace or window-side table !)
In this under crowded, intimate dining room there will be NO families, NO CHILDREN , NO
disruptions. Only quiet good music. A peaceful environment. A haven from the hustle, bustle,
noise and pushing and shoving and rushing of the real world.
On your table, in a crystal bud vase, there will be a single dewy fresh red rose for your lady. (It
and the vase are hers to take home.)
We will begin with a carafe of our wonderful house Italian wine - red or white, your choice -
compliments of Giorgio! And fresh baked , piping hot, lightly garlic-buttered Italian breadsticks.
6
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 7 of 624 --

For dinner, all the TENDERNESS the two of you can handle - if you choose the specialty of the
house: an entree of melt-in-your-mouth tender veal on a bed of angel hair pasta , with a to-die-
for pesto sauce ... or your choice of five other wonderful entrees.
Any choice from our dessert tray ...
Espresso .. .
And finally, a heart shaped box with four delicate, Italian gelato filled chocolates presented to
your lady with a flourish !
Now , is that an evening to enjoy, to luxuriate in , to remember? Will that make you a hero? Ah -
Giorgio GUARANTEES it.
We can only accommodate twelve couples each evening with this very special Romance
Dinner, so it's important to call and make reservations as early as you can . Ask for me - Giorgio
Noon to 10:00 P.M. (or stop in for our Businessman's lunch.) See me , and make these
Romance arrangements personally. I'm the handsome looking devil in the deep blue smoking
jacket in the lounge.
Awaiting your commands - to make 'a magic for you!
Giorgio
<Insert Title>
<Insert phone number & website URL>
P.S. The cost? EVERYTHING, the entire Romance Dinner for two exactly as I've described is
just $59.95. If you wish, you can even pay in advance with VISA, MASTERCARD, AMERICAN
EXPRESS, or Discover and not be troubled by a check the evening you are here.

Service Business - To Consumers
The Original 3-Step Giorgio Letter #2
"3 coins in the fountain ... "
Photo 	<Insert three shiny pennies>
<Insert Date>
Dear <Insert First Name>,
COPYRIGHT-FREE
As you can see, I've attached 3 shiny pennies to this letter. I've done this for two important
reasons: first, to grab your attention for just a moment or two or three. Second, to remind you of
that wonderful romantic song "Three Coins in The Fountain . .. "
You see, this is your second notice ... your romance wake-up call from me, Giorgio, the
Romance Director at Giorgio's Italian Grotto. My bell tolls - does it toll for thee?
It is a stress-filled, busy, hectic, tough, tiring, demanding, mind-numbing energy-sapping battle
each and every day out there, isn't it? I know - after all , I am a businessman too. (And a
husband too - married to my beautiful Isabella for 25 years.) It is easy, tempting, even natural to
come home to "the cave" after a day of doing battle, shove the rock onto the doorway, and
collapse on the couch. BUT WITHOUT FREQUENT ROMANCE, THE FLAME FLICKERS AND
DIES. You know that, deep down inside - but who has the time and energy to create romance?
Giorgio to the rescue!!! You know, I am deeply disappointed that I didn't hear from you after my
first letter and invitation to let me create a truly romantic, memorable evening for you and your
lady. So, I am here again, this time with an EVEN BETTER INVITATION .. . a truly remarkable
offer. ..
For just $59.95, I will give you everything I described before, the romantic dinner For Two -
listed again at that bottom of this letter - AND I WILL EVEN SEND A "STRETCH" GLEAMING
WHITE, FULLY EQUIPPED LIMOUSINE RIGHT TO YOUR HOME to pick YOU - the "Prince"
and your "Princess" up - and bring you home at the end of the evening! (Imagine the look in
her eyes when you walk out the door and, instead of going to the garage, your tuxedoed
chauffer steps forward and opens the door of the limousine for your lady to enter!)
If you say "no" to this invitation - ah, is there no romance in your heart? How can this be?

Giorgio

Service Business - 	To Consumers
The "3-Step Giorgio Letters" For Health & Fitness Letter #1
Photo
A Confidential Letter To The
Husband Of The House From Bruno
Fitness Staminista
Bruno's House of Flex
COPYRIGHT-FREE
"The worst thing I can be is the same as everybody else. I hate that."
Arnold Schwarzenegger
<Insert Date>
Yo - <Insert First Name>
Surprise! Women are different. (I'm sure you ' ve noticed.) And that loving wife of yours
deserves the best YOU that you can be - from the day you first put that ring on her finger and
every day you 're with her the rest of your life.
So listen up - what I have to say is important.
You take care of her. I'm writing to remind you to TAKE CARE of YOU!
I get it. You're busy. Your job would eat you alive if it could. Pressure from above. Nonsense
from the loon down the hall. And the commute 's a bear. Day-in , day-out. And when you finally
manage to get back to rancho del casa you 're spent. Wiped.
Now , more than likely, you ' ve got the bases covered when it comes to career , relationships,
work-life balance and all that. Kudos t here .
But let's get real. Really real.
"What about your waistline?"
Even better, let's talk energy, stamina, all that and more. How ya ' doing there pal?
Probably not where you were 10 years back. Not where you should be , want to be. And the
trendline's looking not so good is it?
Take off your shirt, check it out in the mirror. .. is that really what you want her to imagine sliding
into that hot tub bes ide her for some cozy one-to-one ti me? Go on , be honest...
Well for you , my friend, have I got a SOLUTION !
11
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 12 of 624 --

With this letter, YOU are entitled to a new lease on a much improved .. . stronger, more vital ,
better in all ways shapes and forms .. . version of YOU!
Let me spill the beans on exactly how...
I call it the <Insert Program Name> - it's exactly what you need to transform mi nd , body, and
spirit from humdrum to HE-MANLY. Here's what's included in the AAA Blueprint:
1) 	Advice. An integrated program of diet, resistance train ing, and cardio - customized
specifically to YOUR current level of fitness (or unfitness as it were ). This isn't some off-the-
shelf program like you'd find on the magazine rack ... I will PERSONALLY design th is for
YOU.
2) 	Access. 2417 access to the <Insert Gym Name> facilities - packed wall-to-wall with the
absolute state of the art in fitness equipment. You won't have to set your schedule to match
ours - we 're open and available to you whenever you're ready, willing , and able.
And last. .. most important of all. ..
3) 	Accountability. I won't leave you out to dry like so many other "fitness" centers, who take
your money and then don 't care whether you get results or not. I WILL MAKE CERTAIN
YOU WIN THIS BATTLE! I guarantee you won't let yourself down because I won't let you
down!
Imagine how you're going to look at the end of these six weeks ... your clothes will fit better,
you'll have more energy, you' ll feel like you can own the world .. .
And your lovely wife will DEFINITELY appreciate the new you. Oh yes.
Now, here's the deal.
The "House of Flex" wasn't built to handle hundreds of weak-willed losers who only show up
once and then head off to fast-food garbage world . .. we 're lean, mean, and focused on taking in
only the few and the proud .
Therefore space IS LIMITED to just a small number of guys like you.
Call <Insert Phone Number> or come in today and ask for me - Bruno, I'm the guy pumping iron
in the main office.
Make it REAL.
Bruno
<Insert Title>
<Insert phone number & website URL>
P.S. The cost? Well , let me pencil it out for you - the six week 24/7 club membership PLUS
custom program typically runs $277. But, because I want to see more men pounding iron with
purpose, I'm going to do this entire package for just $149 ... but you need to hurry, this offer ain't
gonna last.

The "3-Step Giorgio Letters" For Health & Fitness Letter #2
Photo
<Insert Date>
Hey Buddy, I'm back ...
"Failure is not an option . Everyone has to
succeed." -Arnold Schwarzenegger
<Insert Three Shiny Pennies>
COPYRIGHT-FREE
As you can see, I've attached 3 shiny pennies to this letter. I've done this for two important
reasons: first, to grab your attention for ju st a moment or two or three.
Second, those three pennies with Lincoln's face serve as a reminder that he was 3 times the
bad-hombre most people think ... in fact, during his first campaign speech , when some goon
attacked a supporter, 01' Abe went into the crowd, grabbed the guy, and tossed him 12 feet
away!
Now that's an image of the body politic I'm sure you won't forget.
Something else you shouldn't forget. . You see, this is your second notice ... your "get the old
bod back" wake-up call from me, Bruno, your personal Fitness Staminista at <Insert Gym
Name>.
Even if you aren't out there knocking heads on the campaign trail like Honest Abe, life still
remains a stress-filled , busy, hectic, tough, tiring, demanding, mind-numbing energy-sapping
battle each and every day out there, isn't it? I know - after all , I am a businessman too. (And a
husband too - married to my beautiful Rose for 15 yea rs .)
It is easy, tempting, even natural to come home to "the cave" after a day of doing battle, shove
the ro ck onto the doorway, and collapse on the couch.
BUT WITHOUT FREQUENT EXERCISE AND CARE, THE HUMAN BODY HEADS DOWNHILL
FAST. That belt grows tighter. Shirts stop fitting. And that six-pack you used to show off... forget
about it.
Sure. She still loves you and those love handles. But doesn't she dese rv e the absolute best you
that you can be?

Service Business - 	To Consumers
2-Step Seasonal-Timed Letter Sequence Letter #1
Car Care Expert Predicts:
Photo
Hudson Area Motorists will suffer through an
extraordinary tough winter ... batteries will die,
undercarriages rust out, brakes fail... it's gonna
be a horror show out there!
Dear <First Name>,
HOW TO SAVE YOUR CAR FROM
THE ATTACK OF THE "KILLER WINTER "
My name is Harry Horsepower, and I own the <Insert Company Name> at <Insert Location>.
You've undoubtedly driven past it many times. My reason for writing to you now is that I've just
returned from a week-long conference with automotive experts from northern Ohio, one of our
guest speakers was the Regional Director of the U.S. Weather Bureau, and he has predicted an
unusually rugged , rough, bone-chilling winter - the kind of winter that will ju st about kill your car
if you're unprepared.
And , I want to offer you <Insert FREE Offer>, at an incredibly low price, as a "get acquainted
special." I can save your car. More about that in a minute.
First, I have totally free gift for you . With the help of a few other experts, I've prepared a "<Insert
Free Report Name>." This Report includes guidelines for weatherproofing your house, cutting
down on heating bills, keeping your car from letting your down, even fighting off colds and flu!
And it includes over $100 in Savings Coupons ... discounts from the hardware store, the snow
plow service, the pharmacist, and several other local merchants.
This Report is yours FREE, just for asking . Stop in and pick up your copy anytime - no
purchase required . Or return the enclosed postage-paid postcard and we' ll send it to you in the
mail. But, do it now, because we've only printed up a limited supply of these Reports. When
they're gone, they're gone.
Now, let's talk about doing everything possible to safeguard your trusted vehicle. Here's what
we can do for you:
1. 	Radiator Flush: fill, with super-strength anti-freeze; check all hoses and connections.
2. 	Check and charge the battery.
3. 	Install new wiper blades.
4. 	Fill your windshield wiper reservoir w ith anti-freeze cleaning solution.
16
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 17 of 624 --

5. 	Check the brakes and brake lining.
6. 	Check the transmission .
7. 	Steam clean the engine.
8. 	Do a 56-Point top-to-bottom mechanical check-up.
That entire package will cost just $29.95. And , if we uncover any problems - say you need a
new battery, new spark plugs, a hose, whatever - if you give us the go-ahead to fix it we' ll
discount all parts by 10%, and all labor by 20%.
SNOW TIRES ON SALE, TOO
Snow tires are also on sale, and with the $29.95 ULTl MATE PACKAGE, if you buy snow tires
we'll install and balance them FREE. And we'll probably give you a trade-in allowance for your
old tires, too.
FREE WINDSHIELD SOL VENT ALL WINTER LONG
By the way, we' ll re-fill your windshield wiper reservoir tank with the anti-freeze cleanser FREE
all winter long, each time you make a minimum gasoline purchase of ten dollars.
Oh, if you have more than one car in the family, schedule both of them for these ULTl MATES.
The first one is just $29.95, the second $24.95, a third as $19.95. (We welcome VISA,
MasterCard, or American Express.)
TIME IS OF THE ESSENCE - THIS IS A LIMITED OFFER.
Unfortunately, we can only book 15 of these Ultimates each weekday, 20 on Saturday, and they
are by appointment only, so it's important to schedule yours now. Call me personally at <Insert
Phone Number> or stop in <Insert location> and see me. Appointments will be going fast, so
please don't procrastinate. (Our first big 'freeze' could be less than ten days away!)
I hope I'll see you before winter comes calling !
Harry Horsepower
<Insert title>
<Insert phone number & website URL>
P.S. By the way, we GUARANTEE our mechanics' work. I've lived and worked here in Hudson
for 28 years, and many of our customers have been with us for ten or even fifteen years, keep
coming back, and bringing their kids. Read what they have to say about us:

2-Step Seasonal-Timed Letter Sequence Letter #2
Many people are just too darned
Photo 	busy to get their cards ready for winter.
You'll be sorry.
SECOND NOTICE
Dear <First Name>,
If the experts are right, a vicious winter is just a week or so away. When it's 15 below wind chill ,
snow and ice everywhere, will your car start? Battery have enough juice. Brakes work?
Or will some darned hose crack in half? Leaving you stranded.
At the incredibly low price of just $29.95, we ' ll do a thorough check-up ... THE ULTIMATE
WINTER PREP PACKAGE ... and give you FREE de-icer solvent ALL WINTER LONG , in your
windshield tank.
All the details of this offer are spelled out in the copy of the first letter I sent you, about a week
ago (attached.)
Please take a few minutes to read and consider this important offer. It may make the difference
between getting home by dinner or being one of those sad schmucks stuck on the side of the
road , car nosed into a snow drift, hood up ... standing there, shivering , stomping, waiting to be
rescued.
This offer expires in14 days <Insert Date >.
Doing my best to kick winter's butt,
Harry Horsepower
<Insert title>
<Insert phone number & website URL>
P.S. You only have 14 days to take advantage of the Free offer ... yours while supplies last so
hurry before <Insert Date> to claim them.

Lead Generation Email #2 for Halloween
Subject Line: Halloween and "Dance the Night Away"...
Hi <Insert First Name>,
"Dance the night away ... Whoa-oh (ah) come on g-girl, dance the night away. " -Van Halen
Back in 1979, big hair band Van Halen had their FIRST top 20 US hit with this classic rock tune.
But the concept of "dancing the night away" also has a Halloween connection you may not have
known .. .
According to experts, the practice of Trick-or-Treating originated way back to an earlier European
practice known as "mumming" or "guising." This involved going from door-to-door in your village,
dressed up in costumes, and performing a dance routine, song, or even a short play for the
occupants, who would then offer treats in response.
So "trick or treating" actually used to include "busting a move" as part of the evening's action . For
those of us who are somewhat rhythmically challenged , the fact that's gone by the wayside is
probably a very good thing.
One move you DO want to make - and fast - is to act now to take advantage of the special offer
that's only available through <I nsert Expiration Date> that I'm calling : <Insert Offer>.
It's perfect for you if you' re <Insert Type Of People This Will Help>.
To have "<Insert Name Of Offer>" hustled over to you pronto (or any other dance partner you know
of who could use it as well) just call <Insert Phone Number> or go online at: <Insert Website URL>
and our team here will be happy to help you.
Sincerely,
<Insert Your Name >, <Insert Your Title>
<Insert Company Name>

Lead Generation Email #3 for Halloween
Subject Line: A Couple Not-So-Scary Halloween Life Lessons
Hi <Insert First Name>,
"Clothes make a statement. Costumes tell a story." - Mason Cooley
We 're almost there! In just a few days your neighborhood streets will run wi ld with ghosties, goblins,
and munchkins galore ... eager to fill up their sacks with treats and surprises.
It's a night full of fun and tradition . But there's also a couple really important "not-so-scary" life
lessons to be learned as well:
• 	Try On a New Mask Once in a While . As adults, we have to focus on the ongoing realities
of life - bills, jobs, relationships. Of course these matter and are extremely important. But
that doesn't mean we shouldn't step outside the box of our everyday lives at least once a
year and play a different role. Put on a new mask - Astronaut, Firefighter, Werewolf,
whatever - it'll give yourself time to test your wings in a whole different way. You may
discover things about yourself you never even imagined.
• 	"Scary" is Just a Word . Halloween brings with a lot of ominous, frightening elements -
weird, dark, and unknown. It's natural to fear what you don't know. It's the way we're wired.
But "scary" is just a word we use to label things that likely aren't that dangerous at all. That
spooky broken down house you hurry past at midnight is a tranquil cottage by morning. So
too are many of the other fears we shy away from daily. Halloween teaches us that in many
cases the thing we fear is just an illusion.
It's just a great time of year ... and the season's really just getting started ! I' m happy and honored to
have a wonderful team here at <Insert Company Name>, who make magic every day as we work to
doing what we love for friends like you.
Now I don't mean to scare you, but I do want to remind you that we only have a couple days left
before our <Insert Name Of Your Offer> expires Halloween Day. Call us at <Insert Phone Number>
or go to <Insert Website URL> and take advantage of this great deal before it disappears like the
night wind.
Live life to the fullest!
<Insert Your Name>, <Insert Your Title>
<Insert Company Name>

Lead Generation Email #2 for Fall Promotion
Subject Line: Why October starts early every year...
Hi <Insert First Name>,
"Reich st du mir bitte die Brezeln?" {TRANSLATION: "Can you pass the pretzels?'?
I know, it's still September - but one of the most famous October traditions jumpstarts the month a
few weeks early on September 17th :
Oktoberfest!
Revered across the globe, Oktoberfest could well be the world's greatest celebration of brew and
bratwurst. At least, that's how most people understand it.
In reality, Oktoberfest began as an anniversary party for Bavarian Crown Prince Ludwig and his wife,
Princess Therese of Saxony-Hildburghausen who tied the knot way back in 1810. The current
tradition of soaking up the suds didn't get its start until 1819.
If you can't make it to Munich this year to participate, I'm sure you can find several local
establishments more than happy to join in the fun - which runs through October 3rd_
However, there's another dead li ne looming - it in volves that special offer I'm making available only
through <Insert Expiration Date >, which I'm calling: <Insert Offer>.
Even though it's taking place during Oktoberfest, it does NOT involve lederhosen - in fact, it's
designed to fit anyone looking to <Insert Types Of People This Will Help.>
To get the <Insert Name Of Offer> sent to you or someone who could use it just call <Insert Phone
Number> or go online at: <Insert Website URL> and our team here will be happy to help you.
Cheers!

<Insert Company Name>

Step 3
Once delivery is made we send out 6 cupcakes from an amazing local bakery we joint venture with, in
some cases these are hand delivered! (Any address with a Lancaster PA zip code)
Well packaged and awesome presentation, it seems sometimes that our customers talk more about
the damn cupcakes than they do their bed, but in the end they are talking about US!
The same letter that was on the previous slide is sent except that is has some minor tweaks and we
include some more referral cards.
We make it obvious that referrals are expected as part of being a good customer at Gardnerʼs
Mattress & More.
Step 4
We send out the referral check with a handwritten letter, more referral cards, and as an added treat
more cake pops.
We are also beginning the process of setting up a points system where our customers who refer to us
can earn points for fun experiences around our city such as,
Gift certificates to local restaurants

Dear Unhappy Sleeper,
Thanks for spending your time with us today. We truly appreciate the opportunity to help improve
your health and well-being through the investment of a new mattress. Hopefully you tested some incredible
mattresses and we were able to provide you with sound sleep advice. We appreciate that not every
mattress shopper will buy during their first visit to Gardnerʼs. However, weʼd love to be the store you trust
when you make your buying decision.
Please let us know how we can earn your business when you are ready.
We understand that the mattress buying process can be overwhelming and confusing. We also
recognize that as a smart, informed consumer you will research products in other stores. If questions arise
as a result of further product exploration and you wish to tap into our expertise, please donʼt
hesitate to call (717) 299-6228 or email me directly at ben@gardnersmattress.com. I know it sounds
cliché, but Gardnerʼs is truly on your side and weʼd love to be your “second opinion.”
There are many similarities that exist in most mattresses and often what separates one from the next
is a label, some fabric, and deceptive marketing, which saddens us.
We wrote a book to help you with this process, did you get a copy?
Our book “Whatʼs Keeping You Up at Night, A Guide to Overcoming Common Mattress Buying
Mistakes” was produced with you in mind and you should read it. It is a really helpful tool in your
search for a better nightʼs sleep. If you didnʼt pick one up, download it at www.LancasterSleepExperts.com.
Use us a trusted second opinion. Our knowledge base, experience, and
product mix is second to none.
Our mattresses Tempur-Pedic, iComfort, PureLatex Bliss and Aireloom are heavily researched by our
customers like you. We have to be informed and represent out products with integrity. Why? Because
these brands (Tempur-Pedic, iComfort, PureLatex Bliss, and Aireloom) are the same from top to bottom in
construction, design, feature, and price no matter which store you choose to buy from.
830 Plaza Blvd (Behind Park City Mall) /// GardnersMattressAndMore.com /// 717-299-6228	63
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 64 of 624 --

We earn our customers business because they trust us to help
them wake up happy and pain free.
We are the only store to offer a “Dream Room”. The “Dream Room” at Gardnerʼs Mattress & More is
a private mattress testing room designed to allow you a unique, private, and comfortable opportunity to “try
before you buy”.
We understand how big of a purchase this is for you. We also understand the importance of
getting a great nightʼs sleep and we donʼt want to see you make an expensive mistake buying the wrong
mattress. Well, hereʼs your chance to do it right. To set up a Dream Room reservation, call (717) 299-6228
or learn more at GardnersMattressAndMore.com/DreamRoom.
When you purchase from Gardnerʼs not only do you support
local business, but you support 132 manufacturing jobs right here
in Lancaster County!
The prices at Gardnerʼs are competitive, our selection of premium and value sleep products is
unparalleled, and our service is superior. You have my word. Weʼd love to be the mattress store of choice
for you and your family. Again, please let us know how we may earn your business.
To your improved health through better sleep,
Ben McClure, Owner
830 Plaza Blvd (Behind Park City Mall) /// GardnersMattressAndMore.com /// 717-299-6228
PS 	- 	Here are a few questions to ask yourself when making your decision,
1 - Can you test the mattress in private BEFORE you buy?
2 - Have pillows been matched to your sleep needs and position?
3 - Does the mattress you are testing solve specific health issues such as back, hip and
shoulder pain?
4 - Have you been offered a mattress protector that will keep your mattress clean & dust mite
free?
5 - Have you discussed sheet sets that fit the depth of your new mattress and are
guaranteed to stay on?
6 - Is the price of the mattress only good for today only forcing you to make a hasty decision?
If so, RUN AWAY!
7 - Is there a hassle-free comfort guarantee, or a guarantee thats cost you an arm and a leg
to use?

www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 100 of 624 --

Service Business – To Consumers
Referral Campaign
How To Acquire the Second Easiest
Client With A
“Referral Program”
Referrals are one of the fastest and easiest ways to increase your business. Your goal is to get all
of your current clients to refer their friends, coworkers, and relative to you.
Do you think this is difficult?
You may think that this is impossible, because you rarely get a referral now. But believe me, it’s
not that difficult. However, you have to make it happen. It won’t happen by itself. You should
develop, as part of your marketing plan, a referral program.
Why?
Referred clients are better clients:
1. 	They cost less to acquire. This is very important. Anything you can do to get your cost
per new client acquisition down is great.
2. 	They are the second easiest people to sell. Second only to your previous client.
3. 	They are less price resistant. Because someone they trust referred them, they rarely
question your pricing.
4. 	They are more likely to refer, since someone else referred them.
5. 	They are less likely to complain and are easy to please. Even if something does go wrong,
referred clients are more understanding. On a whole they are much easier to please.
For all of these reasons, you should make referrals a high priority.
To maximize your referral, you must have a referral program in place. The program that works
best is the Reward Program.
The Reward Program
The reward referral program is based on compensating a referral source through the giving of
gift certificates or gifts.
FROM BILL GLAZER
100
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 101 of 624 --

Gift Certificates
The gift certificate program is an easy way to develop a referral program quickly. For every
referral that becomes a client, you give the referring client a gift certificate for a certain amount.
The amount usually is tied to a specific dollar purchase or an item purchase. For example, a
$20.00 gift certificate, if the referred client spends over $200.00 is given.
Gifts
The other type of reward referral program is based on giving away merchandise instead of gift
certificates. You can offer something you sell, for free or it can be a nice gift that you purchase
just for referrals. It can be anything. One advantage of the gift referral program is the fact that the
perceived value of the gift might be higher than the dollar value of a gift certificate.
A very important point to remember about the Reward Referral Program is that the best time to
ask your clients for referrals is just as you have made a sale. At this time your client feels that
you were honest and looking out for their interest. You might say something like this…
“You know, this is how I make my living, and I would sure appreciate your help. If you like the
way you have been treated, and if you feel your friends, family and relatives deserve this type of
treatment too, then, I’d like to be the one to help.
So, if you don’t mind, please take a few minutes and give me the names and addresses of a few of
your friends, family members, or co-workers. And as a way of thanking you, when any of the
people you refer to me show up and ______, (spend $ __.__ or buy a _____), I will give you
either $____ or (gift).”
You will need to have referral forms (Exhibit #1) handy for your clients to fill out or for you to
fill out for them.
One problem with asking your clients for referrals when they are in the store, is that often they
do NOT know the addresses of the people they want to refer. One of the ways that we have
developed to handle this problem is to create a referral form (Exhibit #2) for them to take with
them and return with the completed information.
You should take note of the following:
1. 	Since the client is taking the form with him or her, they can give you multiple referrals.
In this case, we ask them for four referrals in order to select their choice of a free gift.
2. 	You want to make it easy for your clients to return the form. In this case, we give them
three choices:
- Choice #1: Fax the form back
- Choice #2: Mail the form back
- Choice #3: Bring the form back to the store
101
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 102 of 624 --

3. 	When the client returns the form, we mail them a postcard that allows them to return to
get their FREE gift. This does two VERY BIG THINGS for us. First of all, it brings them
back into the store where they are likely to make an additional purchase for themselves.
Secondly, it gives us an opportunity to give them another referral form to fill out. Once a
client begins to refer, he is very likely to continue to refer.
Now that you have a name and address, you want to put the prospect into your funnel. I have
found the following system works best.
Step #1: Send out letter #1. You should take note of the following:
• 	Send out this letter in a #10 envelope with the return address of your store, handwritten
address in blue ink, and a first class live stamp. NOTE: do NOT put your store’s name on
the return address. You do NOT want to disclose the fact that is a direct mail offer.
• 	The letter needs to be highly personalized. The darker gray areas of the letter are
customized in Microsoft Word. Note how we insert the following:
- The new referral’s name
- The referring client’s name
- The expiration date of the gift certificate(s)
- The sales person’s name of the referring client
- A handwritten signature
- Two P.S.’s that restate the biggest benefits
• 	Along with the letter, we send out multiple “Savings Certificates” (Exhibit #4) along
with a “no strings attached” certificate for a FREE gift (Exhibit #5).
Step #2: For every new referral that does not respond to letter #1, you should send out letter #2
(Exhibit #6) after the expiration date, which should be about 2 weeks. The procedures are about
the same as for letter #1. The envelope should be hand addressed and the letter should be highly
personalized, as illustrated by the dark gray areas.
Step #3: Call every new referral that has not responded to the two mailings. A couple of tips
when making the call:
• 	Use the referring client’s name when presenting your offer. You need to use the
prospect’s familiarity with references to establish credibility.
• 	Tell the referral how much you would really like to introduce them to the store and your
level of service. Offer to extend the offer to them for another week.
• 	Do NOT forget to ask for a day “day and time” appointment.
• 	Do NOT push it if the referral is not interested. Just politely thank them for their time and
tell them that you will make yourself available whenever they are ready.
Step #4: Do NOT forget to reward the referring client when his or her referral uses the gift
certificate and shops at your store.
102
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 103 of 624 --

A couple of other tips to help you have a profitable referral program:
1. 	To encourage your sales associates to ask their clients for referrals, I suggest you also
give them a bonus for each referral that visits your store and uses the gift certificate
towards a minimum acceptable purchase. At my stores, we gave our sales associates
$5.00 for every referral gift certificate that is redeemed with a minimum of a $250.00
sale.
2. 	Designated one person in your clerical staff to manage the referral program, especially
the tracking.
3. 	On a minimum of a weekly basis, post the amount of referrals each of your sales
associates obtained.
How’s that for a referral system? Pretty awesome!
Keep in mind that it’s only a model. Feel free to make minor adjustments.
Now, if by some extremely remote chance, you have decided that it is not worth giving your
client the gift certificate or the gift, then you need to do the math! (And you need to get your
head checked).
Consider that you only give out the reward if the new client qualifies, and consider how much
each new client is worth over a lifetime.
This strategy takes a little more work and cooperation for it to be effective.
103
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

Google Banner Ad
The traffic is driven from multiple google Adword Campaigns with an automatic download
option (which gets emails address, name and zip code).
This automatically starts two sequences, depending on the information they want.
1st Sequence: Gets a link to a hard copy mailed to them which provides the rest of the
contact details.
2 nd Sequence: As soon as they ask for the lead magnet they automatically go into our 100
day email sequence.
We also insert a copy of our monthly newsletter and an offer based on the most popular
items in their chosen field.
FROM Jay Emery

Service Business – To Consumers
Surge Campaign
FROM Rachel Young
Email #1
Subject Line: Keep Your Dang Money, <Firstname>!
Hey John - Rachel here (John’s wife)!
Ever notice how, ESPECIALLY this time of year, EVERYONE wants YOUR
refund? What’s up with that?
Car dealerships want you to use your W-2 for a down payment! And it seems like
EVERY store you know has the perfect way for you to spend YOUR HARD-
EARNED REFUND.
Well, at Fighting Sheep Dog, we DON’T want your money!
In fact, I was JUST talking with my account manager at the finance company we use
for builds, etc. I wanted to do something for you, as well as other customers, so that
you can keep and use your refund on the other things, but still have that dream AR
you’ve wanted for a while.
“Is there something SPECIAL and OUT OF THE ORDINARY that we can do to
allow our customers to keep their refund, but still take advantage of financing?” I
asked.
“Sure” she says. “We can do 2 years, interest-free financing with approval, usually
takes about 10 minutes in your store to submit the application and get an answer
back.”
...Almost like an after-thought. No big deal to her.
What the Crap, Lady! Why didn’t you mention this sooner????
That’s TWO YEARS to play with your custom, one-off AR-15 or AR-10 while
you make payments on it – without touching ONE CENT of your refund!
That’s 24 months to break it in, shoot it, and have more fun with your friends and
family than is legal in some bleeding heart leftist states!
But wait, she kept going!..
“What about adding a custom Cerakote job to the financing?” I asked with a little
more enthusiasm.
“Yep!” she replied.
“What about suppressors? Can we finance those at 2 years as well??” (My eyes are
like saucers now)
140
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 141 of 624 --

“Absolutely” she says.
“What about modifiying ARs they already own, or even special orders like lever
actions, shotguns, or revolvers???” (I think I might have been yelling from
excitement at this point…)
“Yes, yes, and yes” she tells me.
So, you can come down to Fighting Sheep Dog, build (or modify) the rifle you want,
complete with a custom Cerakote design and a suppressor, special order a Mossberg
500 or NEMO Arms Omen Recon in 300WMMG while you’re at it…and it’s all
covered under 2 years interest-free financing (with approval).
Best of all…you get to…
KEEP YOUR TAX REFUND!
You’re happy because you get the gun(s) you’ve always wanted.
Your spouse is happy because they can spend the refund on other things.
We’re happy because we get to earn your business! It’s win-win-win!
To get details on how financing works or what you’ll need in order to get started on
your build ASAP, head over to:
http://fightingsheepdog.com/financing/
But you’d better act fast!
I’m not sure how long the finance company’s generosity will hold out!
We’re excited to get started on your first (or next) AR build while you keep your refund
in your pocket! Looking forward to seeing you soon!
To Your 2A Success, Rachel Young Fighting Sheep Dog CEO of Fun

Aaaaand, go!

COPYRIGHT-FREE
Service Business - 	To Consumers
Lead Generation Email #3 for Fall Promotion
Subject Line: 3 Keys to More Self-Confidence
Hi <Insert First Name>,
"Confidence is going after Moby Dick in a rowboat and taking tartar sauce with you." - Zig Ziglar
Just about everyone struggles with self-doubt at times. Negative thoughts, negative beliefs hold us
back from the successes we crave and deserve.
Here are three things you can do to build up your own self-confidence:
1. Be Grateful. It's almost a certainty that you have options and opportunities far beyond those
available to most people throughout history. Today is packed with potenti al. Being grateful for what
you have today enables you to better face the challenges of tomorrow.
2. Define What You Want. Consider this conversation between Alice and The Chesire Cat:
Alice: "Would you tell me, please, which way I ought to go from here?"
Cat: ''That depends a good deal on where you want to get to."
Alice: "I don't much care where ."
Cat: "Then it doesn't matter which way you go ."
If you're unsure about your goals, you can't have any confidence in your ability to achieve them.
Define what you want and write it down.
3. Fail-Forward-Fast. Don't let fear of failure stop you in your tracks. The greatest tales of success
involve multiple failures - Henry Ford , Colonel Sanders, Thomas Edison. They got knocked down
over and over again, but refused to accept defeat. They learned from their failures and kept moving
ahead.
One thing that I have total confidence in is our team here at <company name> - everyone is focused
100% on doing what's best for friends like you.
On that note, there's only a few days left before our <Insert Name Of Your Offer> expires, so call us
at <Insert Phone Number> or go to <Insert Website URL> and take advantage of this special deal
before it goes away.
We believe in you ,
<Insert Your Name>, <Insert Your Title>
<Insert Company Name>
142
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

Dentistry
The "3-Step Giorgio Letters" For Dentists Letter # 1
Photo
<Insert Date>
Dear <Insert Name>,
A "Monstrously" Fun Invitation To Mom
From Dr. Susan Oxford
Director of Brighter Smiles
Oxford Dental Associates
" You are not fully dressed until you wear a smile ."
COPYRIGHT-FREE
There's no greater joy in life than seeing your precious child wake up in the morning, jump into
your arms for a warm snuggle, and then look up into your face and give you a great big smile
that says without words "I love you ."
Even at the end of a long day - whether at the office or just handling the many other dueling
priorities of life - that smile lingers and helps you get through the day.
But the busy-ness of life can force upon us choices that don't always provide the greatest
benefit for the long term. Work, school, sports, music lessons, dance recitals, on and on and on
all play an important part in the rich and full life you want for your child.
So sometimes the simple act of a "dental checkup" just falls by the wayside. "Oh, I'll get around
to it, " you probably have said (and to be honest, I've said those same words myself more than
once!)
You know your child's smile - glowing, happy, and precious - is a treasure that you can't take
for granted. But with the hectic chaos of life, setting aside time for that regular checkup - and
dealing with a child's natural reluctance (and may I even say, "fear") of going to a dentist - it's
something you plan to put on that calendar, but all too often just doesn't make it
Well, as one parent to another, I have got a SOLUTION!
With this letter, YOU and YOUR child are invited to a special family event
we're holding in our office early next month on <Insert Date and Time> .
Yes, this is your invitation to a very exclusive, private PARTY that I'm sending to a few of my
friends like you who have kids. And I guarantee it will not only be loads of fun for you and your
child, but also make them realize that coming to the dentist is truly something to look forward to.
144
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 145 of 624 --

We' re calling this event:
"Night of the Living Smile Monsters!"
When you and your child arrive, you'll be ushered into a world of magical wonder. On the
outside, you' ll see a typical dental office. But once inside the door, there' ll be live musicians
playing your child's favorite sing-a-long songs. Video games available to play from every chair
and throughout the waiting room. And the entire office will be filled with crazy inflatable
creatures of all shapes and sizes - along with plenty of toys, games, and crafts for all ages.
And at <Insert Time> on the dot, Mysterio the Great will perform a special magic show that not
only amazes and entertains, he'll also show how easy it is to have a glowing smile that lasts a
lifetime.
Of course, there'll be plenty of delicious and healthy food and drinks for you and your family.
You won't walk away even a little bit hungry that much I can promise you .
The message your child will get loud and clear is that visiting the dentist is not only nothing to be
afraid of, it's part of a lifelong journey to having and keeping a healthy, happy smile.
Finally, when you leave, your child will walk out the door with their own goodie bag packed with
fun prizes and gifts.
Now, does that sound like a fun way to make sure your child grows up with a positive, healthy
view of "going to the dentist?" I guarantee it.
Because we can only handle a very limited number of guests, it's important to call and make
reservations as early as you can . Call <Insert Phone Number> and ask for Mary, our Associate
Director of Brighter Smiles and she'll take very good care of you, I promise.
Can't wait to hear from you - we're ready to help make every day brighter!
Dr. Susan Oxford
<Insert Title>
<Insert phone number & website URL>

you take a second to chat with Mary to set up your child's next appointment. It'll be easy, quick,
and you' ll walk away knowing your child's beautiful smile is in good hands for the future.

Chief Financial Officer at
123 Baker Street From
James T. Kirk
Captain of Wealth Optimization
Kirk Financial Group

"Industry, thrift and self-control are not sought because they create
wealth, but because they create character." - Calvin Coolidge
<Insert Date>
Dear <Insert Name>,
Famed author F. Scott Fitzgerald once told his friend Ernest Hemingway, "The rich are very
different from us ."
"Yes ," replied Hemingway, "they have more money."
Of course, you realize there's more to wealth than calculating a number. True wealth is found
when every aspect of your life is in balance - financial, personal, health, friends, and
relationships. Many find ways to accumulate money, but few actually create lasting wealth along
with a quality lifestyle where all of the things that truly matter work in harmony together.
And today it's more complex than ever before. With the 24/7/365 news cycle, you're constantly
bombarded with crisis after crisis - each one begging for your attention, with pundits of all
stripes offering conflicting advice as to how this or that will affect today, tomorrow, and the future
that grows ever more uncertain.
According to the conflicting tales from these "experts,"
• 	If you're an optimist, you're a fool looking to throw good money after bad ideas.
• 	If you're a pessimist, you're a coward sliding into poverty while opportunity beckons.
If you're simply trying to do what's right for you and those you love - all the while working hard
to focus on career and family - then this crazed environment can make quality financial
planning seem like a luxury only the already-wealthy can afford.
Well you don't have think that way any longer my friend, because I have got a SOLUTION!
With this letter, as Chief Financial Officer of your home, YOU are entitled to receive my book:
"<Insert Book Title Name >" it's new. It's timely. And it provides simple tips (or "hacks") that you

• 	The tax write-off every homeowner should be taking , but almost nobody does .
• 	Secrets to leveraging your company's 401 K plan into a zero-risk way to fund a side
business.
• 	How to reduce every subscription you pay - water , electric, garbage, internet, phone -
you name it, there's an easy way to cut costs in seconds.
• 	And a lot more besides!
Again , it's packed with valuable strategies I GUARANTEE you won't find anywhere else -

Just A Quick Letter to Introduce Myself

FREE GIFT Reserved For You.
Dear <First Name>,
My name is Doctor John Subluxation, and my office is just a few miles east of the Oak Hills
Community, Route 3. I'm pleased to tell you that many families living in Oak Hills and your
neighbors, have been relying on our office for years. I'd like us to get acquainted too.
Research done for a recent article in Time Magazine indicates that 1 in 20 Americans consulted
with a Doctor of Chiropractic last year. There are two reasons why I'm calling that to your
attention.
Reason #1: If you or a family member ever suffers from back or neck pain, you
need to choose the right Doctor to help. (Choosing the wrong Doctor might
prolong the suffering and increase the cost.)
The "1 in 20" statistic shows that Chiropractic is gaining ever-increasing recognition as THE best
approach to treating back and neck pain , including everything from an accident injury to
unexplained chronic nagging pain. I specialize in treating such conditions, have 19 years'
experience you can trust, and have helped thousands of people, including many of the
employees at the nearby Ford factory, professional athletes, even rodeo cowboys.
Reason #2: Back and neck pain should NEVER be ignored.
Back and neck pain represents one of the most common, least understood ailments. It causes
more people to lose time at work, for example, than anything else, other than the common cold .
But, unlike the cold, it may not just "go away." People often "ignore it," but that can actually be
dangerous. Back and neck pain may be an important warning signal from your body of
something that will get worse if ignored. On the other hand, many causes of such pain ... even if
that pain has been reoccurring off and on for years ... can be eliminated through appropriate
care in a very short time.
A Beneficial FREE Service For You

My name is Jane Smith, I'm a Licensed Massage Therapist and my office, "America's Best
Massages," is only about 5 minutes away from you <Insert Home/apartment
complex/neighborhood>, on West Texas Lane across the street from the Foxboro Hotel, almost
at 1-28 .
I'm pleased to tell you that many of your neighbors have been relying on me for stress reduction
and therapeutic massage for quite some time. (I've been in practice since 1986.)
WHY DO PEOPLE GO TO MASSAGE THERAPISTS?
HOW MIGHT YOU BENEFIT FROM THERAPEUTIC MASSAGE?
Reason #1 : As a natural, better response to stress or pain than aspirin and other pills and
drugs. <Insert Compelling Reason>
Reason #2 : As an effective means of improving circulation, replacing fatigue with renewed
energy, and relieving stress and tension . <Insert Compelling Reason>
Reason #3 : Relieving pain from weekend athletics. Golfers, tennis players and bowlers often
say that regular massage even improves their game, thanks to improved flexibility, range of
motion and pain-free movement. <Insert Compelling Reason>
Increased circulation is one of the main benefits of massage - with certain massage techniques,
I can enhance the delivery of vital oxygen and nutrients to your body's tissues ... speed up your
body's removal of wastes and toxins ... and replace fatigue with energy. <Insert Compelling
Reason>
Release of muscular tension is another wonderful benefit of massage therapy. During your
massage, there is a release of "endorphins" - your body's own , internal, natural pain-killers -
relaxes muscles, calms nerves, release pent-up stress. Business people frequently report
166
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 167 of 624 --

clearer-thinking and more energy as a result of massage therapy. <Insert Compelling
Reason>
WHAT IS THERAPEUTIC MASSAGE LIKE?
Depend ing on your needs, I use therapeutic Swedish massage, acupressure (not puncture),
Reiki , and other techniques ... for a full-body massage. .. for either a half-hour or an hour. Your
massage takes place in a 100% private, comfortably appointed, soothingly dim lit room . Our
office, incidentally, looks and "feels" very much like a docto r' s office. And, incidentally, every
Licensed Massage Therapist has at least 6 years education and t ra ining, and is typica lly very
knowledgeable about anatomy, the circulatory system, and the spine. In addition , I have over 15
years of experience.
I am a professiona l. Your massage experience is professional in every way. It is also very
relaxing and enjoyable.
Incidentally, many medical doctors, chiropractors and physical therapists refer patients from
auto or at-work accidents, sports injuries, and various other situations to me for therapeutic
massage. (And we accept insurance assignment in most of these cases.)
THIS LETTER ENTITLES YOU TO A 15-MINUTE FREE CONSULTATION, STRESS CHECK-
UP AND MASSAGE DEMONSTRATION (A SEATED MASSAGE)- OR A $10.00 DISCOUNT
ON YOUR FIRST HOUR-LONG MASSAGE, YOUR CHOICE.

quick, 15-minute consultation and seated massage demonstration. OR, if you prefer, you may

and pick up your FREE COPY of a very useful booklet on conquering stress. It's free, there's no
obligation .
Stress, incidentally, is something you shouldn't ignore. Aches, pains, frequent headaches,
frequent muscle tenseness, daily fatigue, and frequent stomach problems - these are "warning
signals" from your body to you. Your body is warning you that is being abused, not getting the
release and relaxation it needs. Silencing this message w ith aspirin, sleeping pills, and other

approach. Try it! And there are other, surprisingly simple things you can do for yourself, at

therapeutic massage can help a lot!

energy, and relieving stress and tension . Increased circulation is one of the main benefits of
massage - with certain massage techniques, I can enhance the delivery of vital oxygen and
nutrients to your body's tissues ... speed up your body's removal of waste and toxins ... replace,
fatigue with energy. <Insert Benefits>

massage, there is a release of "endorphins" - your body's own , internal, natural pain-killers -
relaxes muscles, calms nerves, release pent-up stress.

Many medical doctors, chiropractors, and physical therapists refer patients from auto or at-work
accidents, sports injuries, and various other situations to me for therapeutic massage. (And we
accept insurance assignment in most of these cases.) But you don't have to be "sick" to
"qualify" for massage! Massage is a wonderful way to facilitate and enhance health and well-
being , to keep the stress of everyday business from accumulating, aging , tiring , or even
weakening your resistance to illness.

OR AT THE END OF HIS/HER ROPE?

- and that IS very much appreciated. If you know someone who has recently been injured at
work, play, or in an auto accident. .. is under considerable stress ... complains of headaches, neck
or back pain , or insomnia ... please do them and me the favor of telling them about the benefits
of therapeutic massage.
It is important to interrupt the vicious cycle of stress. Otherwise, the greater the nerve pressure,
the tighter the muscles become. Headaches occur more often. Sleeplessness occurs more
often , etc. Therapeutic massage is the natural, drug-free, side effect free, pleasant way to
interrupt this negative cycle and let the body heal itself.
If you know someone who might benefit from our services, please give them the enclosed

massage demonstration or a $10.00 Discount on their first one-hour massage. (And please sign

Temporary relief of a specific pain is not the only reason for continuing with massage therapy.
Just because the pain has gone away does not mean that the underlying cause of the problem
has been taken care of. More time is usually needed for that. And pain relief is just one part of
achieving the best possible health and vitality.
There are many good reasons for regular therapeutic massage, includi ng :
1.) A natural, side-effect free response to stress, headaches, "computer screen neck
pain ," back pain , etc.-instead of pills, drugs.
2.) Improves circulation . Every cell in the body is dependent on blood and lymph flow to
provide oxygen and nutrients, and to eliminate metabolic waste. Massage increases
circulation , assisting and speeding up the processes. Many longevity experts believe
that massage therapy enhances youthful appearance and younger looking skin .
3.) Replaces fatigue with energy. If you are frequently tired ... drained" at days' end ...
you' ll find that regular therapeutic massage can make a big , positive difference.
4.) Release of muscular tension . During massage, there is a release of "endorphins"-
your body's own, natural pain-killers. This relaxes muscles, calms nerves, and diffuses
built-up stress.
5.) You're concerned about the cost. I can only urge you to consider this an important
investment in your health and well-being . The cost for a full hour's massage every week
divides out to about $5.00 a day which is a cup of coffee from Starbucks. With our
Coupon Book Program, you can save 20 %. Or, with a 1-Year: 24 Massage Pre-Paid
package you can save 30 %.
Hope to he ar from you very soon , to schedule your next appointmen t.
Sincerely,
Jane Smith,
<Insert Title>

The Bryley Birthday unconverted 3-letter sequence has been used every year since 2007, with
slight modifications to match Bryley’s age (he was 6 in 2007 when we first started this
campaign).
The ROI has ranged from a low of 20:1 to a high of 78:1. It has brought in from just over
$20,000 to almost $40,000 each time we’ve used this campaign.
186
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 187 of 624 --

Hi mister or misses patient,
My name is Bryley and my daddy is Dr. Bergh. 	He
told me you came in to see him to talk about
crooked teeth, but haven’t done anything about it
yet. 	My daddy says you wanted to think about
getting a beautiful smile and have not decided if you
want that or not.
Well, my birthday is March 23rd and I’ll be seven years old. 	I’m so
excited this year my birthday is on Easter. 	My parents are taking
me someplace special but haven’t told me where I’m going yet.
I told my daddy that I wanted to celebrate my 7th birthday with
all his friends at his office. 	I thought a good way to celebrate was
to have my daddy give you a present from me.
So during the month of March, my daddy will take 7 percent off
your treatment. 	But since my birthday is in March, he won’t be
able to continue this special deal past March 31st.
Be sure to call my daddy at (818) 242-1173 today to get your
present from me. 	Just mention my name, Bryley, for your 7
percent price reduction. 	You’ll be glad you did, and so will I.
Sincerely yours,
Bryley Bergh
PS. 	Here are my two dogs Rex and Scamp.
They were born the day after Christmas and are very fun to play
with. 	Oh yeah, my big sister Kaigan was also born the day after
Christmas.

www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

Dear Mr. or Mrs.,
You'll notice I've attached a $300.00 "bill" from The United Bank of Bryley. Well,
that's me, Bryley, and 1 bet you're wondering why I've sent this coupon to you. Please
let me explain.
I've been watching the presidential candidates campaign, and frankly I'm confused at this
point. There's one who is older with more experience, and one who is younger who says
he wants to change everything. Well, I think-that in order to change or for things to get
better, you have to feel good about yourself.
And one of the biggest things to help you feel good about yourself is to be happy with
your smile.
My dad, Dr. Brian Bergh, said you came in to talk to him about your dream smile, but
you haven't decided whether you want that yet or not. Now, I'm not sure if you just
don't want the smile of your dreams right now, or if you're concerned about the economy
like a lot of people.
Well, I talked to my dad and convinced him to try and help you as much as he can. And
since I'm thinking about running for president when I get older (see I'm only 7 right now
and you have to be 35 to run for president), I thought it'd be good to start practicing
ASAP.
I noticed that President Bush sent a check to a lot of Americans, calling it an economic
stimulus package or something like that. So, I've included a "check" that you can use at
my dad's office. It's worth $300 towards your orthodontic treatment. Don't try to use it
anywhere else, 'cause you might get in trouble, and then I'd feel bad and have to give
you a pardon.
The presidential election is November 4th, and my dad said that after November 3rd you
really can't campaign any longer. So the $300 coupon is only good until November 3rd.
So call (818) 242-1173 today and speak with Sharon and let her know you want to start
getting your dream smile. And be sure to call before November 3, 2008.
Sincerely yours,
BryJey Bergh
.S. Call Sharon today at (818) 242-1 ]73 to get started on your way to your dream smile.
During tougher times, the better you feel about yourself, the more successful you will be.

Dear Friend,
Recently, my son, Bryley, sent you a letter and a postcard offering you $300 off your orthodon-
tic treatment at Braces By Bergh. We still haven't heard from you, and Bryley knows how im-
portant it is for you or your child to have the smile of your dreams. In fact, he loves to smile so
much that it just makes sense he wants you to feel good about your smile, too.
Now, Bryley is a character. He’s such a good boy, and he feels very strongly about your suc-
cess. Did you know that people with beautiful smiles are more successful than those who don’t
have such a great smile?
It’s coming down to the wire, and in about a week, we’ll know who our next president will be.
This will be an historic election regardless of who wins.
And as you know, Bryley is only 7 years old right now, so technically he’s not able to run for
President of the United States. But give him time and he’ll do a great job for you.
And how can you resist that smile. You can bet he’ll have braces on soon to help him get his
dream smile. Why not you or your child? After all, even in today’s economy, having an attrac-
tive smile will help you achieve better results than without. And you’ll feel better about your-
self which will make a huge difference in how you appear to others.
So go ahead and make your vote count. And even though you can’t write Bryley in on the bal-
lot, you can vote for him by using this letter to claim your $300 credit towards orthodontic
treatment in our office. But you must hurry, this offer WILL end on November 3, 2008. Cam-
paigning is not allowed on election day, so your vote for Bryley has to be in by November 3rd.
But don’t wait until the 3rd, call us today at (818) 242-1173.
Neither John McCain nor Barack Obama can give you such an immediate benefit.
Sincerely yours,
Dr. Bergh
Dr. Brian Bergh
P.S. This offer expires on November 3rd, so call today so you don’t miss out!194
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 195 of 624 --

The Cat’s Away 3-step sequence was born after reading Bill Glazer’s Outrageous Advertising
Book. He talked about making money while on vacation, and I though, hmm, how can I do that?
So we put together this 3-step sequence to send to unconverted leads.
The 2nd letter was sent in a brown paper bag with the excuse that if they brought in some candy, I
would extend the deadline and allow them to still receive the bonus.
With the 3rd letter, we actually sent them 2 small candy bars so they could bring those in and still
receive the bonus, trying on our part to reduce any obstacle they might have in not responding to
these letters.
This brought in a 64:1 ROI the first year we did this, most recently, the ROI dropped to 31:1, but
still worth the time and effort to convert our uncoverted leads.
195
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 196 of 624 --

While The Cat’s Away, This Mouse Wants To Play –
And Save You Up To $750 Off Your Or Your Child’s
Orthodontic Treatment.
Dear «Responsible_party_greeting»,
I wanted to get this letter out to you ASAP, because I know you are going
to want to read it and take advantage of this special deal.
Dr. Bergh is going to be out of the office during the week of Labor Day
(September 8th – 10th). Something about a vacation (OOPS, I’m not
supposed to say he’s going to be on vacation, so let’s keep that little slip of
the tongue quiet, OK?).
But anyway, here’s what I’m thinking. Usually when someone is getting
ready to start their orthodontic treatment, Dr. Bergh is in the office
overseeing all the going’s on. 	But since he’s going to be gone during that
whole week, I thought maybe I could sneak some people in and give them
a great deal on their orthodontic treatment. You see, Dr. Bergh really
wants to help you get the smile of your dreams, and I know you’ve been
sitting on the fence about getting started.
So, here’s what I’m thinking. If I can get enough people to sign the
paperwork to get their orthodontic treatment started, Dr. Bergh will be so
pleased, that I can sneak in a discount without him even really knowing.
Now, Dr. Bergh’s a smart guy, but after he’s been gone for a week, a lot of
things pile up – like the mail, messages, etc.
And, also, I know the first day he comes back, we see a few more patients
that day than normal. He’s an important guy around here, and our
patients’ who had a minor concern while he was away need to come in for
him to take a look.
196
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 197 of 624 --

Because he’ll be distracted, I’m sure I could sneak in at least a $500 discount on your
treatment, and for the first 3 people who schedule their appointment I’ll see if I can even
bump that up to $750 – boy, am I taking a risk here!
See, if I can sneak a bunch of these by him on that first day he comes back, then viola!!,
we can skate through unnoticed. And you know what, even if he does notice, he’ll be so
happy you’re finally going to realize your dream smile, he’ll forget all about that.
But, you’ve got to come in to see me between September 8th and 10th or it won’t work.
All you need to do is come in sign the “paperwork,” make your initial payment and then
we’ll set up another appointment to get you started.
So put this letter down right now, and call me at (818) 242-1173 to set up that
appointment between the 8th and 10th of September. I can’t offer it any other time,
because the next time he’s out of the office, I will be, too.
So, don’t delay, call me today at (818) 242-1173 and set up that appointment so you can
get the Cat’s Away secret promotion for your orthodontic treatment.
Sincerely,
Sharon Wadsworth
Treatment Coordinator, Braces By Bergh
P.S. Even if it’s 2 AM in the morning or the weekend when you get this letter, call and
leave a message saying you want take advantage of the Cat’s Away secret promotion!!
P.P.S. Remember, the first 3 people who schedule their appointment will get the full
$750 off their treatment.
P.P.S. Not ready yourself to get started? Do you have a friend or co-worker that you
know wants the smile of their dreams…be a hero and give them this letter. We’ll honor
the $500 off their treatment if they call by September 10th to make their initial
appointment. Be sure they mention the Cat’s Away secret promotion for their special
deal.

www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 198 of 624 --

Hi, it’s me Sharon, again.
Recently, like just the other day, I sent you a special letter describing my
Cat’s Away special promotion. You did get that letter, didn’t you?
But, I’m surprised I haven’t heard from you yet. And you know what?
We had 4 fast-acting people call over the weekend and leave me a
message to secure their Cat’s Away maximum discount of $750 off their
orthodontic treatment. You’ll remember that I was only going to be able
to offer the full $750 discount to the first 3 people who scheduled their
appointments. I felt so bad for that 4th patient who acted so quickly, that I
ended up giving them the full $750 off their orthodontic treatment.
Now, you’re probably wondering why I’ve sent you this brown paper bag.
You see, I was trying to figure out how I could get Dr. Bergh to agree to
give the full discount to anyone else who schedules their appointment
before September 10th. I’ll explain the paper bag more in just a moment.
I don’t know if you know this or not, but Dr. Bergh just loves chocolate.
So, I figured I could bribe him with some chocolate and not get in trouble
for extending the $750 discount to you in addition to the other 4 people
who already made the decision to get the smile of their dreams.
You can still get the $500, no problem, as long as you schedule your
appointment by September 10th. But if you still want the full $750
discount, I’m going to ask you to bring along some form of chocolate.
Doesn’t have to be much. Dr. Bergh is just as happy with a plain Hershey
bar as he is with something more expensive live Godiva chocolate. Your
198
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

choice.
When you call to schedule your appointment, just let me know you’re going to bring in
some chocolate – you can put it in this brown paper bag so I can keep it a secret from the
other girls in the office (you wouldn’t believe how quickly chocolate will disappear from
the office - or maybe you would!!). We wouldn’t want them sneaking it away and
leaving Dr. Bergh without any reason to OK our plan.
So, call me today at (818) 242-1173 and let me know that you want to get started on your

Dear «Responsible_party_greeting»,
I know, I know, this is the 3rd letter you’ve received about my Cat’s Away promotion to
start orthodontic treatment at Dr. Bergh’s office. If you haven’t received my other 2
letters, you’d better check with your postal carrier and find out what the deal is. The last
one I sent was in a brown paper lunch bag.
Well, I wanted to send an apology to you, because in my last letter I was asking you to
bring in a piece of chocolate as an “ethical bribe” so Dr. Bergh would OK extending the
full $750 promotional discount on your or your child’s orthodontic treatment.
I got to thinking about why I still haven’t heard from you. This is such a great deal I’ve
set up, and it’s about to end. I mailed this letter on Saturday, so you should be getting it
on Tuesday, September 8th and this great promotion has to end on Thursday, September
10th. That’s because Dr. Bergh is out of the office this week, and I wanted to “sneak” you
in and get you on your way to your dream smile.
The only other reasons I could think of are that you haven’t had time to go get some
chocolate, or that you aren’t sure where to go get some chocolate. In either case, I’ve
solved your problem, because I’ve included some chocolate with this letter.
Now, you can go ahead and eat it, or you can call me at (818) 242-1173 and tell me you
want to get started on your way to your dream smile.
Imagine how you’d feel about yourself with your brand new smile.
And imagine, too, where else 2 small pieces of chocolate could be worth a whopping
$750 to you. And at this time, that’s a whole bunch of moolah!!
So, don’t delay. Call me at (818) 242-1173 as soon as you get this letter and we’ll get
you scheduled to sign all the paperwork and schedule your appointments to get started. I
can’t tell you how many times I’ve had people come in to the office and say how they
wish they had started treatment earlier – in fact, just yesterday we had a patient say she
had thought about her dream smile for 5 (yes, 5) long years. Don’t let time slip away.
Call me today at (818) 242-1173 and get moving forward towards your dream smile.
I’m getting more excited just thinking about it myself.
Call today, and let me know you want to take advantage of the Cat’s Away promotion
and that you’ve got your chocolate ready to go for your full $750 promotional discount.
Sincerely,
Sharon Wadsworth
Sneak Extraordinaire and Chocolate Caretaker

-- 219 of 624 --

STRAIGHTENING TEETH HAS COME A LONG WAY.
Braces work. Yet, even though they come in bright colors these days, the brackets and steel wires
still work the same way. Food still gets stuck in them. Flossing and brushing are an adventure. And,
when you’re a teenager sporting a mouthful of metal, easy and confident smiles can be hard to
come by.
ALL SMILES. NO SACRIFICES.
Back when we were teenagers, putting up with the hassles of braces and feeling self-conscious
about wearing them were necessary in order to get the smile you wanted. For today’s teens,
getting through those formative years can be a little tougher. Thankfully, straightening their teeth
with Invisalign TeenTM is a lot easier.
Claim a FREE Copy
of Dr. Burleson’s
Latest Book!
(See Back for Details)
THE ADVANTAGES ARE CLEAR
InvisalignTeen is a series of virtually invisible aligners that gradually straighten your
teen’s teeth. And because they’re removable, proper dental hygiene is a
cinch. Since most people won’t even know your teen is wearing
Invisalign, they’ll have the confidence to keep on smiling. Best of
all, treatment costs about as much as braces, and fewer doctor
visits take up less of your time. Our aligners even include a color-
coded indicator that tells you how long your teen’s been wearing them.
FIND OUT WHY MORE AND MORE MOMS ARE
CHOOSING INVISALIGN TEEN
Choosing how to straighten your teen’s teeth is a big decision. Visit our website to see
what other teenagers and their parents have to say about us. Then take a few moments to
take our Self Assessment together with your teenager.
Invisalign Teen will help give your teenager the confidence
of a great smile—and they’ll love you for it along the way.
Claim Your FREE Copy of
Dr. Burleson’s Latest Book at
www.FreeInvisalignBook.com
DR. DUSTIN BURLESON & ASSOCIATES
4135 N Mulberry Drive

3 Step Direct Mail Campaign
• Message in a Bottle (3D Mailer)
• Postcard, references the 3D mailer
• Sales Letter, references previous mailings
Monthly Cost
$895 - $1,495
New Patients Acquired
12 per month (average)
Return on Investment
15:1
Do You Sometimes Feel
Like You're Stranded on a
Desert Island Not Knowing
How You Can Possibly Fit
Braces Into Your Budget
and Busy Schedule?
Let's face it. Your days are not filled with free time. And braces
aren't getting any cheaper. Those two complaints are the most
common reasons I have found that patients like you will delay
getting braces or Invisalign and instead spend a lifetime with
crooked teeth. Just a few short years ago, fear of pain was
another factor keeping you from the smile of your dreams.
Today, more than ever, a confident smile is important in social settings, school, at
work, and especially when meeting new people. Scientists have determined the
human eye can judge a crooked smile in less than 1 second. People with an
attractive smile have been rated as having more intelligence, higher paying jobs, and
being more friendly. It's not fair to judge a book by its cover, but the truth remains.
Your smile says a lot about you and your social status, your approach to life,
and your confidence. What is your smile saying about you?
Recently you visited our office and spent time with our smile
specialists developing a custom plan for your new smile. We
haven't seen you since then. Frankly, I'm a little concerned. I'm
concerned that you didn't get a question answered or, worse,
you've decided that you cannot afford braces or fit orthodontic
treatment into your busy lifestyle.
I'll cut to the chase. We want you back. I'm so confident that you're
going to love your new smile that I'm giving you the opportunity to
spread your payments over 36 months or longer with 0% interest
and the lowest down-payments I've ever offered.
Why would I do such a thing? To be brutally honest, my accountant
thinks I'm nuts. But I know something he doesn't. I know that
patients who finally make the decision to “get off the sideline” and
take the first step towards a spectacular new smile, the first step
away from living a life with crooked teeth… these
patients come back at the end of treatment and thank
me for changing their lives.

Dear Friend,
With Halloween just around the corner, it’s a perfect time to discuss
a HUGE problem many people make... ignoring a scary-looking smile!
I’m talking about the hide-your-smile in family photos or lack-of-self-
confidence smile that can secretly hold people back from their full
potential in life.
THERE IS A SOLUTION - which is why I am giving you a
personal gift certificate, valued at $200.00! 	It’s waiting for
you at the end of this letter, and I created it just for you!
I’m giving you this gift certificate (and cure-all for scary
smiles) to thank you for visiting our office for your initial
consultation and to introduce you to our amazing team of smile
specialists.
To grab your gift, clip off the coupon below and Call Samantha at

This Columbus Day has never been a better time to take advantage of the life-long returns of a great
smile. Discover the self-confidence that comes from a straight, healthy smile.
You are receiving this email because I believe you can benefit from braces or Invisalign. You recently
met with one of our treatment coordinators but have not scheduled the next step towards a healthier,
happier you.
Frankly, I'm puzzled.
There are only 3 reasons, in my experience, why people say NO to a lifetime of smiles. I'd like to review
them with you and help you take the next step in improving your smile and the health of your teeth.
1) I can't afford it. With flexible financing, low down payments and a special offer I'm about to make to
you at the end of this email, I think you'll be pleasantly surprised how affordable a new smile can be.
2) I'm too busy. School, work, family activities... it's enough to make your head spin. Luckily, you can
relax at Burleson Orthodontics. With more after-work, and after-school hours than any other office in
Kansas City, your appointments will be something to smile about. Today's technology allows us to see
you every 8-12 weeks during your treatment, reducing the number of orthodontic adjustments by more
than half, compared to older treatment techniques.
3) I should wait until the time is right. Now is the time to take advantage of the most-flexible, most-
convenient, and most-aggressive orthodontic payment plans our industry has ever seen. Gone are the
days of parking your money in a high-yield CD and getting 5 or 6% return on your investment. You are
lucky to get 0.5% return on any dollar sitting in the bank and that means one thing : dollar-for-dollar,
investing in your smile has never been more affordable.
Date: October 8, 2012 12:48:00 PM CDT
To: dustin@burlesonortho.com
