-- 226 of 624 --

This is why I'm writing you.
For this special holiday, we celebrate someone who had both vision and courage. Columbus had the
vision to explore uncharted territory and the courage to face his fears. I enjoy reading stories like his and
those of other pioneers and explorers. They make my daily meetings, deadlines, and challenges seem
rather trivial. After all, something like straightening your smile is not as difficult as traveling across the
Atlantic ocean for 5 weeks, powered by nothing but the wind. Your charted course is much smoother.
The journey towards a Spectacular Smile ® with Burleson Orthodontics has been traveled by more
than 7,000 patients in the Kansas City area. With customer service ratings above 98%, I think you'll
agree... when you "set sail" with the team of smile specialists at Burleson Orthodontics, you are
partnering with professionals who will make your orthodontic journey a smooth, comfortable voyage.
To be absolutely certain that your orthodontic treatment is so exceptional that it changes your life and
improves your self-confidence so that you can face life smiling, I'm offering you a limited-time opportunity
to Discover a Spectacular Smile ® with Burleson Orthodontics. Just like Columbus arrived at his
destination in three ships, you will benefit from three unique, money-saving features to this special
offer:
* Lifetime Guarantee : if for any reason you ever require braces again in the future, even if it's because
you didn't wear your retainer, you pay nothing. We will straighten your teeth again for free, guaranteed.
* Pay 3 Way Option : receive a 5% courtesy for payment in full, split your down-payment into 3 easy
installments, or finance the entire treatment with our trusted resource, Care Credit.
* Take Your Own Voyage : receive a FREE Caribbean Cruise for 2 anytime in the next 3 years as my
special way of saying Thank You and Congratulations on taking the next step towards a Spectacular
Smile ® with Burleson Orthodontics.
I'M NOT CRAZY TO MAKE AN OFFER LIKE THIS... but I would be if I didn't limit how many people can
take advantage it. I'm setting the number firmly at 12. If you are not in the group, you can certainly still
take advantage of orthodontic treatment with our office, but the Caribbean Cruise Vacation is off the
table. As of this writing, three patients have already reserved spots in advance.
There are 9 remaining spots.
This offer expires TODAY, Monday, Oct. 8th at 4:59 PM (CST).
Here's How to Sign Up:
1) Call (816) 929-6922 and ask for Ashley.
2) Email me directly at info@burlesonortho.com
3) Fax your name and telephone number toll-free to 866-253-1590
Remember, we're celebrating Columbus Day because he took action. There were countless other
explorers who made their way across the Atlantic and spotted land after Columbus and many who wished
they had, but we don't celebrate a special day in their honor. Make this the day that you take action on
your future. Now is the time.
To your spectacular smile,
Dr. Burleson
P.S. Ashley has been strictly informed to end the Columbus Day Offer at 4:59PM (CST) today. After 5pm,
the Caribbean Cruise vacation is "gone like the wind" and will sail away faster than the Nina, Pinta and
Santa Maria.
P.P.S. For the exceptionally-busy, you can guarantee all of your appointments are scheduled so that you
never miss work or school. Ask about our Platinum Plus program. It's not for everyone and it is expensive
(starting at $7,997). I can't stay at work until 8pm for everyone, but for a select few with schedules that
make a bee-hive seem "calm and quiet" in comparison, you have this option available to you. It does fill
up every month and it does require acceptance into the group by me personally, so if you are interested
in applying for the Platinum Plus program, ask Ashley for details.

CAPTAIN AMERICA:
THE FIRST AVENGER (2011)
Monsters generate their city’s power by scaring children, even though the monsters are terribly afraid of being contaminated by little
kids. Watch what happens when an adorable 2-year old girl sneaks into the monster’s world in this classic, Disney Pixar favorite.
A criminal mastermind named Gru develops a plan with his army of little yellow minions to steal the moon. His plan is interrupted
when he encounters a trio of orphan girls who look at him and see him as a potential dad.
Members of the He-Man Woman Haters Club find out that Alfalfa has fallen
in love with Darla...a girl! Now his pal Spanky has to set him straight before
Alfalfa’s love jeopardizes the club’s chances of winning the big go-kart race.
The peaceful island community of Amity is being terrorized by a Great White
shark. After numerous deaths and a drop in tourism, the police chief, a marine
scientist and a grizzled fisherman set out on an adventure to stop it.
Billy Crystal stars in this hilarious comedy about a city native and his friends having a mid-life crisis
and taking a vacation to the Wild West while driving cattle. The city-goers meet crazy cowboy Curly
who not only teaches them how to become real cowboys, but also about life in the open air of the west.
Katniss Everdeen voluntarily takes her younger sister’s place in the Hunger Games, an annual
televised event in which two teenagers from each of the twelve districts of Panem are chosen at
random to compete and fight to the death.
BRING CHAIRS, BLANKETS AND THE FAMILY FOR AN OUTDOOR MOVIE AT DUSK!
A video game villain is tired of being the bad guy and wants to be a hero. He sets out to
fulfill his dream of being a good guy, but his quest brings havoc to the entire arcade. Families
will fall in love with this ingenious comedy as they recognize many video game favorites.
A theme park on an island full of living dinosaurs suffers a major power outage causing the prehistoric creatures to run free.
Visitors are now facing the adventure of their lives as they try to survive and escape the island.
After being deemed unfit for military service, Steve Rogers volunteers for a top secret research project that turns him into
Captain America: a superhero dedicated to defending the ideals of the USA.
A silent film company transitions into sound, only to discover their leading lady has a not-so-desirable voice. They bring in a
beautiful, aspiring actress to dub her voice which only causes a love triangle disaster. You won’t want to miss Gene Kelly & Debbie
Reynolds in this classic, romantic comedy.

Who 	Else 	Wants 	a 	FREE 	iPad 	Mini?
Special President’s Day Offer by Invitation Only
February 1, 2013
Dear Sophia,
I’m writing you this letter in time for President’s Day with a special offer
that even a President would find hard to pass by. 	You might have noticed we
have been giving away a lot of iPad minis around the office for referral
contests, holiday promotions and simply to have some fun!
One of our patients even said “you guys treat me like royalty around here...
I get great service and an iPad mini!?” Needless to say, the iPad mini has
been a big hit. 	In honor of doing things BIG (think Presidential) my staff
encouraged me to give away 12 more iPad minis to the first 12 patients on our
list who pay off their orthodontic balances before 2/28/13 *
Here’s how this works : pay-off your orthodontic
treatment before 2/28/13, and get a FREE iPad Mini!
It’s that easy.
* Personally, I think it’s the staff’s way of avoiding all of the paperwork that is involved in sending monthly bills and
tracking monthly payments for our patients in braces and Invisalign. Or, it could be the satisfaction they get when they
see the look on the face of our patients who have received an iPad mini. Either way, I try to keep them happy. They sure
make my life a lot easier. You might even say they treat me like a President. So, I’m passing the feeling on to you.
Call Sarah or Tara today and tell them you want the Presidential
Treatment. 	They will rush an iPad mini to your door when you pay off
your remaining balance with Burleson Orthodontics. 	You can even put
it on your credit card or Flex Spending debit card *
To your spectacular smile,
Dr. B
Dr. Burleson
Reserve your FREE iPad Mini Today.
Call Sarah at (816) 741- 5311.
P.S. 	Speaking of presidents, your flex spending account has been an issue of
much debate with President Obama and Congress. 	Regardless of where you stand
politically, your flex spending account is going to be limited in 2013 and
beyond. 	Better use it before you lose it.
P.P.S. 	There really are only 12 of these iPads available. 	When they’re gone,
we won’t be holding a presidential debate to see who won & who lost.
First 12 before 2/28/13 at 4:59PM and we’re done. 	That’s an executive order.

www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

Who 	Else 	Wants 	a 	FREE 	Amazon 	Kindle 	Fire 	?
From : Sam Burleson (age 5), Dr. Burleson’s son
March 7, 2012
Dear Addressee,
I just wanted to send you a note of thanks. 	You have been a patient of
my dad’s for quite a while now and he tells me you have been a
fantastic to work with! 	It is because of this I wanted to let you in
on an exclusive promotion my dad is offering to a select few of his
very best patients. 	And, he’s doing it just in time for tax day. 	You
know, the day when “Uncle Sam” gives most of us a refund.
I’m only 5… and I’m not an uncle yet… but, I do have the same name as
the guy who is going to send you a tax refund. 	Never missing an
opportunity to celebrate a holiday (even if it’s only tax day), my dad
thought it might be fun if I gave you a gift on the same day Uncle Sam
gives you a tax refund.
Here’s how this works : take advantage of
your tax refund, pay-off your orthodontic
balance, and get a FREE Amazon Kindle
Fire! It’s that easy.
My dad has only authorized twenty patients to receive an Amazon Kindle
Fire for this promotion (that’s all the fingers and toes I have to
count on, after all). 	Don’t wait... my dad says, “just like an
accountant heading for vacation the day after tax day, this deal is
GONE on April 15, 2012.” 	My dad is always saying silly stuff like
that.
Good luck on getting a new Kindle Fire and happy tax day!
To your spectacular smile,
SAM
Sam Burleson (age 5) - Dr. Burleson’s son
Reserve your Amazon Kindle Fire Today.
Call Samantha at (816) 759-0119
P.S. 	Don’t forget to mention this letter when you call. 	I’m not quite
tall enough yet to reach the phone all by myself… so, please ask for
Samantha. 	I want to make certain my dad adds you to the list and you
receive your Amazon Kindle Fire!
P.P.S. 	If you have more than one family member in braces in my dad’s
office, you can take advantage of this offer for each family member!

This Labor Day has never been a better time to take advantage of the life-long returns of a great smile.
And there's no hard work involved on your part when you say yes to the self-confidence that comes
from a straight, healthy smile.
You are receiving this email because I believe you can benefit from braces or Invisalign. You recently
met with one of our treatment coordinators but have not scheduled the next step towards a healthier,
happier you.
Frankly, I'm puzzled.
There are only 3 reasons, in my experience, why people say NO to a lifetime of smiles. I'd like to review
them with you and help you take the next step in improving your smile and the health of your teeth.
1) I can't afford it. With flexible financing and low down payments, starting your new smile with Burleson
Orthodontics is a walk in the park. There's no hard work involved on your part at all... something to
celebrate this Labor Day.
2) I'm too busy. School, work, family activities... it's enough to make your head spin. Luckily, you can
relax at Burleson Orthodontics. With more after-work, and after-school hours than any other office in
Kansas City, your appointments will be something to smile about. Today's technology allows us to see
you every 8-12 weeks during your treatment, reducing the number of orthodontic adjustments by more
than half, compared to older treatment techniques.
3) I should wait until the time is right. Now is the time to take advantage of the most-flexible, most-
convenient, and most-aggressive orthodontic payment plans our industry has ever seen. Gone are the
days of parking your money in a high-yield CD and getting 5 or 6% return on your investment. You are
lucky to get 0.5% return on any dollar sitting in the bank and that means one thing : dollar-for-dollar,
investing in your smile has never been more affordable.
This is why I'm writing you.
For this special holiday, we celebrate the social and economic achievements of American workers. My
grandfather was a coal miner in West Virginia, making 25 cents per hour. My father was a small
business owner and my mother a school teacher. They kept a nice home and taught me and my brothers
the value of a dollar. I know firsthand that paychecks don't stretch. They are not big rubber bands. If
you value hard work and run on a budget, like I do, then you know that the investment in your smile or the
smile of your child must be planned out in advance. Just like my parents and grandparents who planned
in advance for family expenses, your comfort and convenience with the cost of braces (not just the
process of straightening your teeth) is something we take very seriously.
The journey towards a Spectacular Smile ® with Burleson Orthodontics has been planned out and
made easy for you. It has been traveled by more than 7,000 patients in the Kansas City area. With
customer service ratings above 98%, I think you'll agree... when you set aside the fears or frustrations
that braces are "too expensive" and start your treatment with the team of smile specialists at Burleson

-- 257 of 624 --

Meet Dr. Rick Schaefer
I
’m Dr. Rick Schaefer M.D.
did you know that over 100
million Americans suffer
from knee and joint pain? In
fact, this pain accounts for 25%
of all visits to primary care
physicians and half of all anti-
inflammatory drug prescrip-
tions. I’m pleased to announce
that knee pain sufferers don’t
have to wait any longer to get
the most advanced non-surgical
FDA cleared treatment.
If you suffer from any degree of
knee pain, I invite you to regain
control of your life by visiting
Knee Specialists of Wisconsin, a
state of the art medical facility.
What is osteoarthritis?
/STEOARTHRITIS␀/! ␀ALSO␀KNOWN␀
as degenerative joint disease, is
the most common type of arthri-
tis. In OA, the surface layer of
cartilage breaks down and wears
away resulting in pain, swelling,
and loss of motion of the joint.
In most individuals joint damage
develops gradually over years.
The cause of osteoarthritis is un-
known. Factors that might cause
it include the following:
␀␀s␀"EING␀OVERWEIGHT
␀␀s␀'ETTING␀OLDER␀WEAR␀AND␀TEAR
␀␀s␀*OINT␀INJURY
␀␀s␀␀*OINTS␀THAT␀ARE␀NOT␀PROPERLY␀
FORMED␀ALIGNMENTIMBALANCE␀
PROBLEMS
␀␀s␀␀!␀GENETIC␀DEFECT␀IN␀THE␀JOINT␀
cartilage
␀␀s␀␀3TRESSES␀ON␀THE␀JOINTS␀FROM␀CER-
tain activities including sports,
work and leisure activities
What is available to
treat knee pain?
After careful study and several
trials the FDA cleared a new
treatment aimed at helping those
with knee pain. This treatment is
a high tech answer for all those
who think that surgery, dietary
supplements and prescription
medications are the only option
to eliminate knee pain.
How does this treat-
ment work?
Advanced live motion x-ray
technology with dye allows
Doctors to pinpoint problem
areas with extreme accuracy. A
viscosupplement is then injected
and the healing process begins.
Viscosupplementation bonds
with naturally occurring joint
fluid to create a lubricating and
cushioning layer. It also reduces
pain, inflammation, and swell-
ing of the joint. Most patients
compare the treatment to getting
a shot at the doctors office and
report little pain or discomfort.
What is actually
injected into the knee?
(YALURONIC␀!CID␀(YALGAN ␀IS␀
similar to substances that occur
naturally in your joint. The out-
SIDE␀OF␀THE␀JOINT␀JOINT␀CAPSULE ␀
is comprised of a sturdy fibrous
tissue. The lining of the joint
capsule contains synovial cells
which secrete a thick, viscous
synovial fluid. Hyaluronic acid
contributes to the viscous nature
of the joint fluid, nourishes the
cartilage, helps eliminate waste
products, lubricates the joint and
acts as a shock absorber inside
the joint. Hyaluronic acid is
reduced or lost with those who
suffer from osteoarthritis.
Therefore, the easiest way to think
of hyaluronic acid injections is
that they help replace the joint’s
natural fluid, which is otherwise
lost in osteoarthritis. It is sort of
like changing the oil in your car.
If your car were to run low on
oil you would have some serious
wear and tear on the moving parts.
More oil would be necessary to
remedy the situation.
When will I feel results?
Most people feel better in a
matter of weeks and can begin
enjoying everyday activities.
Will my insurance cover
this treatment?
Medicare and most major
insurances will pay for some
if not all of our services.
How do I know that this
is right for me?
In most cases, if you have knee
pain, this is a great solution.
Our doctors will give you an
honest and fair evaluation of
your particular knee pain. To
accommodate demand, we have
opened our schedule for the
first 30 callers to receive a
KNEE PAIN EVALUATION.
NOW IS THE TIME TO
TAKE CONTROL OF YOUR
LIFE AND SAY GOODBYE
TO KNEE PAIN THE
NON-SURGICAL WAY!
“One of the best things is
that there is virtually little
pain with the injections.
He is so good!
I have gone from
being scheduled for a
knee replacement
surgery to actively
getting around again.”
— Inarae D.
What are patients saying?
New FDA Cleared Treatment Proven to Relieve Knee Pain
A D V E R T I S E M E N T
Treatment covered by Medicare and most major insurances.
Considering Surgery?
P
eople who suffer from knee pain typically try supple-
ments or pain medications before seeking help from a
doctor. When all else fails and the pain is too much,
SOME␀FEEL␀THAT␀SURGERY␀IS␀THE␀ONLY␀OPTION␀␀"EFORE␀YOU␀PUT␀
yourself through months of immobility, pain, rehab, and hefty
medical bills, consider something else.
Treatment at Knee Specialists 	Surgery
of Wisconsin
Cost 	Covered by most insurance 	Deductible, co-pay, medications,
plans including Medicare 	time off work, etc
Risk 	Redness, swelling possible 	Complications, poor outcome,
at injections site 	addiction to pain medications
Pain 	Little to none 	Can be severe for months
Recovery␀ )MMEDIATE␀ 	-ONTHSYEARS

-- 258 of 624 --

A D V E R T I S E M E N T
Copyright © Epic Marketing 2011
Is there a lasting treat-
ment for the symptoms
of Neuropathy?
Treating a problem by masking the
symptom has never been a viable long
term solution. Previous treatment
options for Peripheral Neuropathy
have been a small handful of pain
medications. This type of pain relief
is temporary. Often these treatments
lead to even more health problems or
worse yet—addiction. So many people
innocently fall into abusing pain pills
while initially using them to alleviate
the pain. It’s time to look into a solu-
tion to your pain that does not involve
prescription pain pills.
If you suffer from one or
more of these symptoms,
you might have Diabetic
Peripheral Neuropathy
Many patients have been frustrated by
traditional care, only to find that their
symptoms keep getting worse. Dia-
betic Peripheral Neuropathy is a nerve
disorder caused by Diabetes. Over
time, uncontrolled sugar levels can
damage your nerves. This nerve dam-
age causes different symptoms and the
problems first appear in the toes, feet,
and hands. Some other contributing
factors to Neuropathy may include:
hereditary disorders, inflammation,
chemotherapy and certain other
medications.
Call today!
262-649-8408 620 S. 76th Suite 240, Milwaukee, WI 53214
www.kneeWI.com
CALL TODAY
TO SCHEDULE YOUR
APPOINTMENT!
Finally, a Lasting solution for
Peripheral Neuropathy
Neuropathy may
contribute to emotional
stress and depression
Many people suffering with pain don’t
realize that the symptoms could be
due to Peripheral Neuropathy. It is a
condition that can be misdiagnosed or
ignored until it is unbearable. This can
affect all aspects of your life and may
even cause emotional stress or depres-
sion. Why suffer longer than you need
to? If you feel that your symptoms may
be caused by Peripheral Neuropathy,
call today and schedule an appoint-
ment with Dr. Schaefer. If you are
experiencing severe pain, take action
now! Don’t let pain control your life!
The solution: Lasting
Neuropathy treatment
Our new program for treating Periph-
eral Neuropathy is a minimally inva-
sive series of injections combined with
therapy, which has helped hundreds
across the country.
Our combination of therapeutic
procedures utilizes breakthrough tech-
nology that aids in healing the dam-
aged nerves. This treatment restores,
stabilizes, and rebuilds the nerves in
your extremities. The vast majority of
patients who have gone through our
program have reported a significant
drop in the level of pain after just the
2nd or 3rd treatment. Each patient will
receive customized treatments for
their condition in order
to achieve the
best possible
results.
WHAT ARE PATIENTS SAYING?
“This has been a fantastic year at Knee Specialists of Wisconsin. We have helped hundreds of
pain sufferers find lasting relief from their persistent pain. We are pleased to expand our offer-
ing and bring hope and pain-free lives to many others. If you suffer from pain due to Peripheral
Neuropathy—tingling, numbness, burning, or you can’t even feel your feet—I invite you to call
our office and schedule an appointment to learn more about the latest treatment available. More
than 20 million Americans suffer from Peripheral Neuropathy, a condition caused by damage
to the nerves. Whether it’s work, play or time spent with the family, Neuropathy pain ultimately
lowers your quality of life by affecting everything that you do. I am here to tell you that there is
hope. You can get rid of your pain and get your life back. At Knee Specialist of Wisconsin, we of-
fer the most advanced programs available and our goal is to help you have a better quality of life.
Call and schedule your appointment to speak with me personally. We will explain the options for
treatment and determine whether you qualify for our program. There is no obligation, and the
only thing you have to lose is your pain.”
— Dr. Rick Schaefer, M.D.
There are many symptoms of Peripheral Neuropathy, which is essentially damage to the pe-
ripheral nerve system. Some Peripheral Neuropathy sufferers describe it as wearing an invisible
‘sock’ of pins and needles, burning pain or extreme electric-like sensitivity to touch. Others
report the sensation of walking on broken glass or thumbtacks.

-- 329 of 624 --

Section 3
Business to Business
People mistakenly believe and stubbornly insist that
"business to business" is dramatically different from
"consumer" marketing - and they are dead wrong. 	The
truth is that the differences are minimal. 	Often, strategies
that work in consumer marketing work even better when
applied in the corporate environment. 	There are 2 main
reasons for this; it is more important to "stand out" in
business-to-business, and "business-to-business
marketing" is a misnomer ... businesses don't actually buy
anything ... people in businesses buy.
329
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

capabilities "sleeping" in your computers ... advise you on how to "wake 'em up" ... and show you
how to really improve your business with the computer capabilities you already own.

darned computers." ( In fact, a page of my clients' comments is enclosed.) I promise: amazing

and many cities and counties; if you aren't dealing with tarping laws now, you WILL be. (You
can check with your highway patrol and local police concerning their current enforcement
practices. There are tickets, fines, and hassles.)

laws and reasons, most cl ients discover that XYZ Tarps deliver lots of other important benefits.

Attention: If you read this letter and realize that you DON’T meet the high standards that we’ve set
for our exclusive program, then I urge you to throw this letter in the trash right away and continue
on doing your business exactly as you are right now.
Finally! 	There’s a way to
keep clients from
constantly badgering you to lower your prices…
AND set yourself apart from the competition
so that your paycheck is increasing…
no matter what the economy is doing!
You CAN free yourself from needy clients and provide them with reliable, working
equipment that won’t break down on them… and if it does, the repair is FREE!
PLUS you’ll increase your sales (which will in turn increase your own paycheck) and
you’ll be able to offer a service that simply can’t be undercut, can’t be stolen by
distributors, and that will keep your clients coming back for more and more.
How would you like to increase your sales
by $198,225.20 this year?
Take just a few minutes to find out how you can qualify to be one of the few people that will have access to
this service for your clients!
Dear Heath,
I’m sure you’re wondering why I’ve sent you a mini trash can with this letter stuffed inside. Well, I did it for 3
reasons:
1. I wanted a sure-fire way to get your attention, and who isn’t curious when a trash can shows up in their
mailbox?
2. I wanted to warn you that if you throw this letter away, you’re tossing out an incredible opportunity to
change the way you do business.
3. I’m really serious about this opportunity being exclusive – in fact, there’s an application to fill out
so we can ensure that we’ve got really quality people on our team. If you don’t meet the criteria I’ll tell
you about in this letter, I really do want you to throw it away because it won’t be the right fit.
If you’re still with me, I’d like for you to take a minute
and imagine your typical day at work.
If you’re like most of our clients, you’re inundated with phone calls and e-mails from clients, asking you to look
up pricing, discuss specifications, find out repair times, give them a discount, help them plan new equipment,
and a million other requests each and every day… and everything is a full-blown emergency.
I was speaking with one of my best clients, Joe from Sherman, Texas. He’s an outside account manager for
the second largest industrial distributer in the country, and he was telling me about how all his clients are
beating him up on prices and his overall sales were down. He got tired of his clients wanting him to be the
cheapest… because every time he lowered his prices, his own paycheck went down!
The best he could hope for was a client who didn’t fight him too much on prices, a new client coming in from a
referral, or a “good” day where he was able to come close to his quota.
356
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 357 of 624 --

But I have to tell you that hopes and dreams are no way to ensure that you’re successful. You have to
actively seek out new clients… and even then, you have to set yourself apart from the rest of the clients and
account managers that are fighting for the business of your clients each and every single day.
I realize that I just described how insanely busy you are every single
day, and then I told you to find time to seek out new clients and set
yourself apart from the competition... You’re probably looking at this
letter thinking that I’m crazy, that I can’t possibly understand what
your typical day is like, and how the heck are you supposed to find new
clients when you can barely breathe?
What if I told you that I could help you increase your average ticket
amount, make your clients happier, AND cut down on those emergency
“I need this fixed NOW!” phone calls?
Would you be okay if I made your job a little easier and helped you make more money at the same time?
(I’ll give you a hint: You should probably answer “yes” to that question.)
My name is Walter Bergeron, and I’m the president of Power Control Services. We’ve developed an exciting
program that can help you increase your volume while keeping your clients happy… AND set you apart from
your competitors so you become the “go-to” person for all their equipment needs.
It’s called our Platinum Rebuild Program, and it’s completely changing the way you do business
with your clients.
Basically, instead of repairing the equipment, we’re going to completely rebuild it from the ground up. We’re
going to use Military Grade Electrical Components instead of using the materials with the least up-front cost.
That means it’s going to run longer and better than a simple repaired piece of machinery.
But we’re not just going to replace the faulty piece and ship it back out – we do a Proactive Rebuild. That
means we’re going to make sure it stays working – every single time – or we’ll fix it until it does. The
equipment will get a full ultrasonic cleaning (instead of the topical cleaning typically performed) to make sure
all the rust and corrosion is removed and we’ll use our Circuit Board Encapsulation Method to make sure that
moisture never gets into the electrical components.
Plainly put: Your client is going to get back better equipment than they sent to us in the
first place.
They’re also going to save money on their
equipment, even though the initial cost is
higher. Typically, equipment fails after only 1
year of regular use, and then they’re going to
spend time and money to get it repaired again
and again. With Platinum Rebuild, they’re going
to fix it once and never have to worry about
paying to fix it again.
But those aren’t the only benefits you’ll get from the Platinum Rebuild Program. We’ve taken our program and
supercharged it so that it’s the only choice you could ever want to offer your clients.
First, and it’s a big one: The Warranty Never Runs Out.
OEM warranties are being extended. Other distributors are extending their warranties. You can’t compete
because every time you do, someone bests you and then you’re back to offering the same plain-vanilla
warranty that everyone else has, and then you’re back to trying to lower your prices.
Not anymore. You can now offer a 100% lifetime warranty. Unless your client blows the equipment up with
illegal explosives or puts it up against a forklift in a cage-style match… in other words, if they use it like
they’re supposed to… it’s 100% covered. Whether it sits on a shelf for 25 years or runs for 24 hours a day,
it’s completely covered.
“We consistently pick up
multiple repairs with every client
we visit and now we’ve got a lot
of momentum to keep going.”
Dan Ortbal
Chemtronics
Marietta, GA
357
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 358 of 624 --

The repair will be performed by IPC 7711/7721 Rework and Repair Instructors and Operators, US Military
Veterans and a Team of Factory Trained Engineering Technicians. There’s nobody better to make your clients’
equipment the best it can be… or to fix it for free if it fails.
Next, we’re going to train you on how to sell it. We’ll
send one of our National Account Managers to your location to
teach you and your staff on every single detail of the program.
He’s going to go with you to visit some clients and even sell the
program for you a few times so you can see exactly how it’s done.

immediate sales for the rebuild program to leave you with a fully
profitable rebuild program in place. All you have to do is pick a date and he’s on his way.
We’re going to give you a Quick Start Implementation Package, full of quick-start guides for you
and your staff, cheat-sheets to use while you’re on the phone, marketing materials you can send out to your
clients (if you want to – see below to find out how we take care of that for you too.) We’ll send you the
pricing catalog so you’ll know exactly the scope of what you can offer (it’s 850 pages… is that enough to
offer?) and we can even create a custom website just for your clients so your branding is on everything you
do.
Then we’re going to set you up with an automated Client Followup System – a fully behind-the-
scenes marketing system that will keep you at the front of your clients’ minds that you don’t have to think
about or worry about or lift a finger to complete.
We’ll send out a monthly newsletter, branded with your company and your contact information, that will be
fun to read but also reminding them that you’re their solution for their equipment rebuild needs. We’ll send
out reinforcement presentations to keep them sold on the idea of rebuilding their equipment, and we’ll make
sure they know to call you to get it handled.
But don’t worry – we’re not going to flood their mailboxes with too much junk. Just enough to keep them
interested and coming back for more.
But we’re not done yet. We’re also going to give you a 25% discount to increase your own personal
paycheck. You’re already going to be making more profit on the rebuilds versus repairs, but the discount will
help you make even more money.
We’re giving you Area Exclusivity. You will be the only one in your area able to offer our program, and
your clients will only be able to access our services through you. We will never become your competitor.
We’re going to back you up with sales support. If you have a question that you simply can’t
answer, you just give us a call and we’ll help you get your client’s needs met. If you want us to help you
design a custom presentation to take to your client… well, we can do that too.
We’re also going to back your client up with
around the clock technical support. If they have
a question, problem, concern, anything – they can just
give us a call and we’ll walk them through how
everything works. That keeps your phone from ringing
with problems all day long, because they’ve already been
answered directly by us.
We’ll ship the equipment completely FREE.
Once you send us the RMA, we’ll send you (or your client) the shipping label and tags they can place on the
machine to indicate what’s not working, and we handle the cost. Even if it’s big, heavy and costs a lot to
ship… you don’t have to worry about one cent.
Finally… we’re going to upgrade you and your clients to Priority Service, completely free.
Your repairs and rebuilds will go straight to the front of the line and be finished before everyone else. Not
only do we offer the fastest service (days, not weeks), but you’re going to be able to say that it’s being done
first.
“You guys and gals are the best.
And that’s why we send all of our
repairs to Power Control Services.”
Doug Hanson
Doug Hanson and Associates
Eagle River, AK

www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 359 of 624 --

Plainly put… we’re going to make you so irresistible to your clients that they wouldn’t dream of
going anywhere else for any repair, whatsoever.
Now for the conditions:
Like I said earlier in my letter, we’ve set some standards that you have to meet in order to qualify for our
program. After all, we can’t just offer it to anyone that asks us for it! So here are the stipulations:
1. The rebuild program is only open for the parts that are our specialties: Drives, Displays, PLC’s and
Metal Detectors. For parts outside of that scope, our repair program is still one of the best and we can still
perform our normal repair service on them.
2. We need to be your sole resource for repairs and rebuilds. We’re committing resources, promising
you that nobody else in your area can offer this service and that we’re never going to go directly to your
clients behind your back… the least you can do is be loyal to us and give us every opportunity for repair as
you can, even if it’s not a Platinum Rebuild.
3. You need to maintain a minimum repair volume of $997 per month, with an average repair
cost of over $500. This means you need to ship us 2 pieces of equipment to be rebuilt per month to
maintain area exclusivity.
4. You need to fill out an application at www.powercontrolservices.com/platinum and agree to go
through our process to ensure that your company is the right fit for the Platinum Rebuild Program.
Once you’ve filled out the application, the process is quite simple.
You’ll present the system to your clients and let us take care of the followup. Once you get an order, you’ll
contact us for the RMA and we’ll do the rebuild. The lifetime client relationships are as easy as pie after that!!
NOW is the time to take charge of your sales and make the kind of money you need to make. Don’t let the
economy be your excuse for why your sales are down and your checks are lower. The Platinum Rebuild
Program is your key to changing the way you do business with your clients and making your paycheck what
you want.
Visit www.powercontrolservices.com/platinum to fill out the application now.
Dedicated To Your Success,
Walter Bergeron
Walter Bergeron

Craig

17828 Suzanne Ridge Drive
Glencoe, MO
Dear Craig,
STOP dealing with the headaches of needy clients that
call you every single year for
em ergency repairs and
expect you to bend over backward to serve them
immediately and beat you up on prices and who will
jump ship to your competitor at the drop of a hat… Or
you’ll soon be taking double doses of this aspirin for the
rest of your career!
I sent you a letter a few days ago telling you all about our Platinum Rebuild Program and how it can
help you reduce your needy client headaches, beat the competition and increase your paycheck.
I’ve been getting incredible response from my first letter, but I haven’t received a qualified
application from your area yet. I wanted to remind you that only one application from each area will
be accepted, and I don’t want you to miss out on your opportunity because you’ve hesitated,
forgotten, or otherwise just taken your time.
Look, I know you’re busy. In fact, I’d bet that you’re slammed most days of the week. Clients will
call you day and night because an emergency to them should be an emergency to you.
I get it. You’re worried about how big your next paycheck is going to be, you’re trying to
make sure all your clients are happy so they don’t jump ship to a competitor, and you end each and
every day feeling like you’ve been through the wringer because everyone wants you to lower your
prices or sweeten the deal or extend your warranty or any of the million other requests that you get.
If you don’t do something to change the way your clients see you, you’re going to have
days like that for the rest of your career.
I hate to say it that way, but it’s true. You HAVE to put yourself back in control. Your clients right
now know that they have the upper hand. You NEED them. That means that they feel free to
walk all over you to get the best deal that they can so that they look good in front of their boss

repairs than have lifetime clients that are continually happy and accept the pricing you give them?

Subject: Set Yourself Apart from Your Competition!
Dear First Name,

I did that for 3 reasons:
1. I couldn’t think of a better way to get your attention, quite honestly.
2. I wanted to illustrate that if you throw away the letter (or, you know, delete this
e-mail), you’re throwing away an incredible opportunity to change the way you
do business with ALL of your clients.
3. What I had to say is pretty exclusive, and I encourage you in the letter to throw
it away if you don’t meet our qualifications.
I know that sometimes the USPS doesn’t have the most reliable delivery rates, and
sometimes you don’t always get things in the timeframe that the sender means for you
to get them.
That’s why I want to at least summarize my letter in this e-mail, so you don’t miss out
on the opportunity just because you didn’t get the letter.
I know that your days are crazy. You’re constantly getting beat up over prices, your
clients are wanting you to bend over backward to help them with yet another
emergency repair, and you’re exhausted and working for a lower paycheck than you
really deserve.
We’ve introduced the Platinum Rebuild Service, which allows your clients to get
completely re-build equipment, using Military Grade parts, and the comfort of knowing
that it comes with a 100% Lifetime Warranty.
We’ll set you up with all the marketing you need, sales and technical support, on-site
training and step-by-step teaching on how to sell the program, a 25% discount (which
means more money in your pocket!)… and you’ll be the only one in your area that can
offer it.
That means you’re going to have a major leg up on your competition.
I don’t want to make this e-mail too incredibly long, so I’ll just list everything you get
here:

equipment to be rebuilt per month to maintain area exclusivity.

agree to go through our process to ensure that your company is the right fit for the
Platinum Rebuild Program.

6355 or just reply to this e-mail and I’ll send you out another copy via Priority Mail. But if
you’re interested enough to apply right now, you can do so at

-Marketing 	message
• 	None of our competitors would send a shock and awe package like this! We would send this
package to them marked with “perishable goods, open immediately” on it. You see everyone
likes to get gifts and this things is so intriguing it is opened up 100% of the time immediately
upon receipt. And when it gets opened up a video starts to play. Since we are from Louisiana
we include a beautiful Mardi Gras king cake in it and the video gives them instructions to start
enjoying the king cake while they watch a short video about our services. This thing gets
results, and since we know that these clients are worth $34,575 each we can afford to spend
the $200 for each of these cases, but we also include a prepaid shipping label and we actually
get these returned to us and they ask for a refill on the King Cake. We have to outsmart our
competitors if we expect to out perform their marketing and that’s exactly what we did. We
have a completely unfair advantage over our competitors and that’s the way we like it.372

I’m Worried about you…
Dear Shelter Customer,
Yes, I really am worried about you. Dawn (our office manager) was
checking on our past customers and she realized that it’s been too long
since we’ve heard from you at Shelter Distribution.
So, we’re giving you the FREE $20.00 Shelter Gift Certificate in this
letter (It even Doubles to $40.00 with your purchase of $200 or more, and
Quadruples to $80 with your purchase of $500 or more)!
Here are 3 Reasons Why Our Competition Hates Us
But You’re Going to Love Us!
1. Get Everything You Need From One Roofing Supplier. Just
One Phone Call: You’ll save time and money when you make one
call to get all of your shingles, felt, nails, caulk, drip edge, vents,
ice & water shield, and yes, even your Roofer Rewards customer
loyalty program.
2. You Get World Class Service. Get next day delivery service or
pick up from our warehouse. We’re so serious about giving you
World Class service that we stake our reputation on it. It actually is
very simple. Everyone here knows Only Happy Clients Come
Back...and our job is to be sure you are happy - every time!
3. You Get Your Order On Time - Every Time: Guaranteed
Delivery Service: Within minutes of placing your order it will be
pulled and ready for shipment. If you place your order on stock
product before 2 PM, it will ship the next day, and if you place it
later and tell us you need it right away, we’ll do our best to get it out that day.
HURRY! Offer Expires April 8th!
What Is A Worry Doll?
Worry dolls are traditionally made
in Guatemala. A person (usually
a child) who cannot sleep due to
worrying can express their
worries to the doll and place it
under their pillow before going to
sleep.
According to folklore, the doll is
thought to worry in the person's
place, thereby permitting the
person to sleep peacefully. The
person will wake up without their
worries, because which have been
taken away by the dolls during the
night.
Parents may remove the doll
during the night, reinforcing the
child's belief that the worry is
gone. Some parents involve the
child in making the dolls to
further increase the psychological
benefits of releasing worries.
$20.00 Shelter Gift Certificate in this letter. It even
Doubles to $40.00 with your purchase of $200 or
more, and Quadruples to $80 with your purchase of
$500 or more!
384
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 385 of 624 --

your next roofing materials order and mention that you received the worry doll and you’ll get a $20.00
Shelter Gift Certificate in this letter (It even Doubles to $40.00 with your purchase of $200 or more, and
Quadruples to $80 with your purchase of $500 or more)! Or bring it by the store and use it in person!
Either way you can’t go wrong!
Sincerely,
Jerry Medley
Shelter Distribution
P.S. Hurry and call today so we can catch up! We really do miss you! This great offer is only available until
March 31st so be sure to call me, Ray or Dawn at 502-636-2581 today!

give them a copy of this letter and tell them to call 502-636-2581 and we’ll be sure they get the same offer!

Dear Dave,
You should always be establishing your credibility and strengthening your reputation whenever
possible. As you have built a successful business, your offline reputation is extremely good! In fact, you
most likely get many word-­‐of-­‐mouth referrals because of your great reputation!
But, how is your online reputation? Do you have any reviews online? If you do, are the reviews good?
You can check this easily by going to www.Google.com, www.Yahoo.com, www.CitySearch.com,
www.Yelp.com, and many other review websites and simply put in your town, state and company name.
We can help you with this research, as well.
Your reputation is so important that I am giving you 5 different ways to learn more about our
reputation management solution. Choose any or all of these methods:
1. 	Read the enclosed Top Secret Special Report “How We Took
Contemporary Dentistry of Groton, CT From 2 Reviews on Google to
44 Reviews on Google Within 48 Hours, How We Helped Angies Pizza
& Pier 27 Lounge Obtain a 26/30 Rating on Google.com, and How We
Helped Galaxy Roller Rink Earn a 28/30 Ranking on Google With 15
Reviews.”
2. 	Listen to the enclosed Audio CD (I recorded this so you can listen to the CD in your car).

-- 394 of 624 --

78% of people trust peer recommendations (reviews), while only 8% trust ads. For example, when you hear
of a good restaurant from a friend, you’re likely to go to it versus if you just saw an ad in the newspaper for
the same restaurant.
Problem: Most businesses today do not ask their clients for feedback.
Why is feedback important? By getting feedback from your clients, you improve customer service, strengthen your
relationship with your clients, and improve your staff and your team.
Why are reviews online so important? The search engines such as Google, Yahoo! Local, Bing, etc. are using reviews
within their own sites, as well as other review websites on the Internet to help rank websites. From a search engine’s
standpoint, there is no better way to rank websites than by listening to the actual customer’s feedback of the respective
business. Remember, the search engine cannot call up or go to each business and then rank websites. The search
engines can only use data to rank websites. Reviews are a big component of increasing your visibility online.
Additionally, by having good, quality reviews posted by your clients you will have social proof and credibility that is
superior to just listing reviews on your website. Finally, these reviews can help turn your prospects into clients.
Why can’t my friends just post reviews on Google+ Local, Yelp, Yahoo! Local, etc.? Google tracks IP addresses (the
location of the reviewer) and looks at review history of the reviewer. If the same IP address is being used or the person
hasn’t posted Google+ Local reviews previously, chances are the reviews will not be displayed to the public. Also,
people can typically tell when reviews are fake, thus giving you less credibility.
How did Dr. John “Jack” Johnson of Contemporary
Dentistry go from 2 reviews on Google to 44
reviews in 48 hours? In November of last year, we
sent an email blast to all of his patients with the
subject: “We Want Your Feedback: Opportunity to
Win an Ipad2.” Dr. Jack got in over 200 reviews
internally. Of those, 42 of his patients posted their
review on Google. For the reviewer taking the time
to post the review on Google, the reviewer was
entered to win the iPad2, three more times. Also,
remember the only reviewers asked to share their
review on Google+ Local or other review websites
are the reviewers who submitted a 5. This helps filter out any negative reviews from going public. Any review that is
less than 5 is submitted internally. Currently, Contemporary Dentistry maintains the top spot for Groton, CT Dentist
and has a 29/30 rating on Google +Local. Since they started with this program in November of last year, we have
helped Contemporary Dentistry gain the top spot for Groton, CT Dentist on Yahoo! Local with 71, 5-­‐Star reviews.
Additionally, InputWanted.com has helped them gain the top spot on CitySearch. Being on top of CitySearch is
important because CitySearch.com feeds their reviews into Bing, which has caused Contemporary Dentistry to be on
top of Bing, as well. 	Finally, we have helped them earn an A rating on Angies List. With such a strong online
reputation, Contemporary Dentistry is far ahead of its competition that virtually has no reviews online. Routinely,
Contemporary Dentistry is getting new patients from online searches as well as people reading the reviews. This
positive, dominating, online reputation positions Contemporary Dentistry as the leader and trusted provider in
Groton, CT and surrounding towns for dentistry services.
For Reagan Homes Only 	Page 1

www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

How Did Angies Pizza & Pier 27 Lounge go to a 26/30 rating on Google+ Local without an email list?
We printed promotional signage that
was put in the restaurant. Many
submitted reviews, right from their
phones. Within a couple of months,
Angies had enough reviews to gain the
top-­‐rating category “extraordinary to
perfection” with Google+ Local.
How did Galaxy Roller Rink earn a
28/30 rating on Google+ Local? We
sent out an email blast, provided
signage, and they announced the
opportunity to win an iPad3 during
skating sessions if people submitted
reviews to GalaxyReviews.com.
Who else is using InputWanted.com? We have over 100 affiliates worldwide implementing this system within their
own respective local markets. We have many more case studies and examples to share. For this system to work, the
business itself has to provide top quality products and/or services with exceptional customer service. Additionally,
having more than 50 transactions per month will help increase the number of reviews that get posted online.
Regardless, asking your clients for feedback and giving them a chance to win an iPad or equivalent prize is a must
whether you have one transaction a year or 10,000 transactions per year as it will strengthen your relationship.
Also, our research has proven that people use Google and other major search engines to seek out businesses, even after
a word of mouth referral. It is very common for people to Google the business name or person’s name before they call
or visit the business. When you Google a service or business, typically your eyes go right to the review area next to the
Google map. Moreover, our research has shown that most industries, other than hotels and restaurants, do not have
any ratings or reviews. When you have 10 reviews on Google+ Local, Google will display your ranking on the main
search results. Imagine the impact of being one of the only businesses to be ranked by Google.
Being visible on Google is so important as there are over 168
million unique people using Google each month, compared to
only 29 million using YellowPages.com, and 6 million for
Yellowbook.com (includes US traffic only, from Compete.com).
The timing is perfect for implementing our review system,
InputWanted.com because most businesses do not yet have a
review system in place, YET. Do a Google map search for a
search phrase related to your business and you will see that most
businesses have 0 reviews right now. At last, you have a chance
to get ahead of your competition, as most businesses do not have a system in place for soliciting reviews; nevermind a
system to filter out the bad reviews from going public automatically, like InputWanted. You can stand out from the
competition and we can help take care of this whole process for you or you can with our proprietary system,
InputWanted.com that costs less than the cost of the prizes given away.

JimmyMarketing is our marketing division, while EasyWebCreations.com is our custom
web design division, which is now a part of JimmyMarketing.
www.JimmyMarketing.com | 860.442.9999 | www.EasyWebCreations.com
Most business owners we talk to aren’t sure if people are actually accessing their
website on a mobile device. We recently met with Gar Kenyon, a manufacturer
of a wide variety of products for the aviation industry throughout the world since
1930, located in Naugatuck, CT. Their first impression was they didn’t think
people looked at their website on mobile devices. The chart to the left, shows in
this year to date, 422 different people have looked at GarKenyon.com from a
mobile device. Additionally, there was a bounce rate of 51.18% on the mobile
website compared to only a bounce rate of 38.12% on the regular site. A bounce
is logged if a user goes to a website and leaves before visiting other pages. The
bounce rate is higher on the mobile site because their full website was not as easy to navigate as a mobile website would
be. As a result of learning this information, Gar Kenyon has decided to have us create a mobile version of their site.
There mobile website will be accessible via www.GarKenyon.com from any mobile device within the next 7 days (the
mobile site will automatically load on the iPhone, Blackberry, Galaxy, Droid, etc). Below you will see their original
website and the design concepts for their new mobile website.
Original Website Is Very Difficult To
Navigate On A Mobile Device Mobile Home Page Draft Mobile Interior Page Draft
At this point, you may be wondering what work is
involved by you, in order to have a mobile website?
1. Simply, fill out the enclosed order form and either mail it to 86 Boston Post Road #3 Waterford, CT 06385, or fax
it to 860.910.4061, or call 860.442.9999 to authorize us to create your mobile website.
2. Once payment has been processed, we will create your mobile
site in a turn around time of less than 2 weeks. Since we have
created your website, we will take some of the content from
the existing site and make a mobile version of your website.
3. You don’t have to do anything, but fill out the order form.
I am so confident you will love your new mobile website; I am offering a 100% money back guarantee. If
after the first 90 days you decide you don’t like the mobile website and you want us to take down the mobile
website for any reason, we will refund you $497.

-- 399 of 624 --

New Customer Follow-Up Campaign
In 2009, I created a campaign to follow up with new customers. Through a serious of 4 mailers and 1
email sent from my Customer Relations Manager, we check in and continue to build the relationship
with the new customers and encourage future sales. We make sure they are happy with their
purchase, make sure everything is working properly, offer them the chance to buy again with a
hundred dollar off coupon, get feedback, give a few small gifts, and ultimately stay in their mind until
they may need to purchase again. The campaign goes as follows:
Immediate Follow-up Package - Welcome letter, product catalog of other solutions, $100
off coupon for a second product purchased within one year, business cards of people
available for technical support for their product.
3 Month Follow-up Package - Check in letter to make sure everything went well with their
product integration, RTA notepad for the thoughts they don’t want to forget, and a
postcard survey for the ones they want to share. The postcard is addressed to us and has
postage so they can fill out a short survey about their experience, and just drop it in the
mail. (For notepad, see Exhibit 3)
6 Month Follow-up Package - Time to start thinking about their next project. They receive
a check up letter reminding them of all the other products we have that may be of use in
the future for them. They receive a catalog of products along with a small gift of a foam
rocket torpedo toy to enjoy until their next need arises. (Exhibit 1)
1 Year Follow-up Package - We celebrate our 1 year anniversary with them as our
customer. They receive the traditional 1 year anniversary gift (the clock), along with a
hand signed card thanking them for being our customer and wishing them a happy
anniversary, as well as a product catalog. (For clock see Exhibit 2)
1.5 Year Follow-up - Customer receives an HTML email announcing that although they
are officially no longer a new customer, they will continue to receive great offers, service,
and products from us. They receive an offer for 10% off a product purchased in the next 3
months.
Results: This has been one of our most successful campaigns. This campaign has been sent to
over 400 customers, and has had on average a 5% return rate with the offers in the packages.
We have seen the percentage of sales from re-orders go up about 35% since the campaign was put
in place.
A new customer is now worth $5,600 over three years. This is a 30% increase from before the
program started.
The following are the materials for the New Customer Follow-Up Campaign:
399
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 401 of 624 --

Gateway Giveaways Campaign
Since distributors sell our product, we often don’t know who the actual end user/customer is. We use
the Gateway Giveaways Campaign to get those end users to register their product with us, thus
giving us all of their contact information.
When a customer uses their product for the first time, they connect it to a pc to configure. The first
page that comes up is an opportunity for the Gateway Giveaway. Users can register their gateway
with us to extend their warranty, and receive a small gift of their choosing.
The Gateway Giveaways page also gives a special offer for referrals. If a customer refers our
company to a friend at another company who mentions the referral when they make a purchase, we
send the original customer a USB rocket launcher as a thank you.
Results: So far we have done about over 150 Gateway Giveaways. These are customers we know
and have contact info for who have and like our product. Allowing us to market directly to in the
future.
The following pages are the letter and warranty card received after a customer registers their
gateway product with us.

Plumb ing
The "3-Step Giorgio Letters" For Plumbers Letter #1
Photo
<Insert Da te>
Dear <Insert Name>,
A Personal Letter To the
Owner of the House From Mario
- Plumbing Engineer
Mario's Water Works
"I am haunted by waters."
- A River Runs Through It and Other Stories
COPYRIGHT-FREE
Your home is a special place. It's where life happens - meals, celebrations, laughter, dreams.
Every home is unique and that's why every home deserves SPECIAL ATTENTION ... in areas
where, more often than not, you fail to think of or consider.
You are busy. Pre-occupied with work, hobbies, outside obligations. There's aggravations great
and small - from that dumb-dumb that you have to deal with every day at the office, to the
challenges of keeping the pantry full . And in the rush of life, who has time or energy to even
think about the finer details of home maintenance?
But small things ... like a downstairs faucet that drips ever so slightly, or a pipe that springs a
tiny, almost imperceptible leak ... can result in enormous water damage, costing you hundreds if
not hu ndreds of thousands of dollars in repairs .
Fortunately for you , my friend , I have got a SOLUTION!
With this letter, YOU are entitled to 49 point plumbing safety check - performed and approved
by your personal Plumbing Engineer, Mario.
When I arrive at your home to conduct this 49 point plumbing safety check, you won't have to do
a thing other than open the door. After putting on a fresh pair of hygienic slippers, I' ll go through
your home top to bottom making sure EVERY pipe, fixture, drain, and appliance are all working
100% up to code.
Every home has 49 specific danger spots when it comes to plumbing and I'll make certain that
before I walk out your door, each and every one of them has been checked thoroughly to make
sure no hidden (and potentially COSTLY) "gotchas" await you in the near future.
"Why," you might be asking , "Is this important to do now? Can't I wait?"
464
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 465 of 624 --

The answer is simple .. .
We see water as our friend , as a valuable and vital resource that we rely on every day. And
rightly so .
But should water - which runs through your home's "veins" at powerful pressure - somehow
work its way out of control, it can create a literal flood of damage and devastation. Carpets can
be ruined. Drywall can get covered in black mold. The entire home could be rendered
uninhabitable.
THAT is what my 49 point plumbing safety check will make sure this DOES NOT HAPPEN.
guarantee it.
Note that we can only accommodate a very limited number of these in-home analyses each
month, so it's important to call and make reservations as early as you can. Ask for me - Mario -
anytime between <Insert Time> . (I ' ll even come by during the weekend if that's more
convenient for you .)
Call today at <Insert Phone Number> to schedule your 49 point plumbing safety check before
it's too late.
Looking forward to seeing and serving you soon!

men, women , and children .

national-chain discount stores. And we provide FREE TAILORING.

character sweatshirts at deep discounts!

clothes.

feeling more confident, remove a pain, or fulfill a desire they've always had>.

your item, like high price deals with bad customer service, etc.>

regret not getting <Insert the amazing savings or offer> and feel guilty for missing out.

Your Home is a valuable investment worth hundreds of
thousands of dollars or more. Your hard work has earned you
this magnificent retreat. But what other investment would you
leave to non-professionals? Your portfolio? No way. Your
retirement planning? Won't happen. Your yacht? HAl So why
would you leave the property you enjoy so much to anyone but a
trained, licensed, and insured professional?
With HomeWatchValet, you get more than experience, you get
the nation's leading expert in Private Home Management,
the author of the book "Leaving Your Home-ALONE", Mark
Mehling. Recognized as one of America's Premiere Experts@,
Mark's expertise has been giving premium homeowners just like
you Peace of Mind for over 6 years.
Before you leave, honestly answer the simple questions in this
brochure. Maybe it's time you turned to a professional who
knows empty homes. What is your time worth? Instead of
wasting it fixing problems at your empty home, spend it wisely
working on your business, travel, relaxation, or philanthropy.
We guarantee our services. A complete refund of every penny if
you are not satisfied. No hassles, no problems, no lawyers
needed. Call us today to see if your property qualifies for the
ultimate in care and attention.
•HomeWatchValet
Home Watch- and a Whole Lot MORE!!

How did you start
 
Home Watch Valet?
Many of our clients
 
believe
 
that
 
HomeWatchValet
 
was
started
 
because of all the
 
hurricanes
 
back in 2004.
 
It
wasn't
 
a major
 
hurricane,
 
but a simple
 
everyday
 
event.
While
 
walking
 
my dog, Zoie, around
 
the
 
block
 
in 2005,
there
 
was water
 
coming
 
from
 
the garage of a house
down
 
the
 
street.
 
No one knew who
 
to call, the
unknown
 
owner
 
was snowbirding
 
and had been for a
couple
 
months.
 
No one knew who
 
to call or what
 
to do.
What
 
would
 
you do?
It was this problem
 
that
 
got me to thinking-
 
why can't
 
snowbirds
 
have an
expert
 
to manage their
 
empty
 
homes when
 
they travel?
 
Scheduled
visits, someone
 
to call- an expert
 
they can trust.
 
They have a huge
investment
 
in their
 
property
 
that
 
may be worth
 
as much as a retirement
portfolio.
	With
 
my aviation
 
'attention-to-detail
 
background,
 
and experience
 
with
premium
 
service, the seed was started.
 
Unlike a typical
 
neighbor
 
or
friend,
 
we incorporated
 
scheduled
 
visits, tailored
 
checklists,
 
emergency
communication,
 
hurricane
 
and storm
 
damage
 
plans, and even security
system type
 
signage in case someone
 
walking
 
by the
 
property
 
saw
something
 
wrong.
Today our service meets the
 
needs of snowbirds,
 
For Sale properties,
.homes
 
left empty
 
when
 
residents
 
move to assisted living,
 
and properties
inherited
 
by out-of-town
 
family
 
members.
 
One simple
 
idea has been
em braced
 
by people
 
everywhere
 
who
 
know the value
 
of their
 
beautiful

professional
 
care.
By the way, that
 
house had a water
 
leak from
 
a water
 
softener
 
that
 
filled
the
 
'sunken'
 
living
 
room-
 
about
 
$25,000
 
of damage.
 
Zoie, my Akita-dog
has passed on, but every time
 
I see that
 
original
 
house, I think
 
of her.

Wasting Hours on the Phone Sorting out Missed Payments?
Introducing the
"Flat Fee Bill Pay program" from HomeWatchValet.
For a single monthly flat fee of $149, all your recurring bills or one
off items that arrive in the mail, are paid. (Does not include
services we arrange or oversee.) Some common examples include
./ telephone bills
./ Cable TV bills
./ electric bills
./ water bills

./ country club bills
./ Department store bills
./ And a WHOLE LOT MORE!
And we GUARANTEE our work!
If any bill for which we are responsible, is not paid on time, HomeWatchValet will pay
all late fees, reinstatement fees, penalty charges, and interest penalties in addition to
reversing the problem so that it won't happen again.
How much time do you spend trying to sort out problems with bills that
arrive at your (other' property? Do you have recurring bills that get mixed
up in the mail causingyourphonetobeshutoff.bring water department
hate mail, or threaten to shut off your TV cable line? Now travel in peace
without worrying about them being paid. And you won't spend hours on
the phone, listening to endless recordings and (press 5 for English' to
solve your payment hiccups.
Only those items that we
arrange and/or oversee. As
you know, anything we
arrange, for which we are
accountable, and/or
oversee is guaranteed by us.

covers our research,
bidding process, on site
management and

pool services

services

vehicles, sprinkler, etc)

here, too. You have to plan in advance to
have someone you can trust, that is always
available, for questions or concerns. That
means someone dedicated to the property
who is not going to be on vacation, gone for
the weekend, or out on the boat for a few
days when you need them.
V4'" lin '", lis,:
No IIlan 101
managing 110m a
distance
m othcr ts
of
Rem ern b er your
a d In 0 nit i-onth at' 0 u t
sight, out of min d "? This
is as true today, in a world
where iPods, iPhones,
texting, and computers can
distract us like nothing
before.
your
home
behind can have only two
effects:
1. You completely forget about it and
hope nothing goes wrong
2. You worry about it all the time
because you are not there and have no
idea what ;s happening, if anything.
One way to over come this problem, is to
make sure you have a complete plan in place
to manage from a distance. What does this
mean? Let's look at the top isues:
WHO VA' GONNA CALL? From the famous
movie, GHOSTBUSTERS, this phrase is true
HANDLING COMMON ISSUES
What are we talking about? Here are some
of the problems that will require some
investigation or simply require access to the
property:
-Outrage ous water or electric bills. You are
relaxing over a margari fa when the morning
mail brings an astronomical water bill. Do
you have a leak at the house? Is it inside?
Underground? Maybe there is another
explanation. Will the person you call be
knowledgeable? If 110t, it is like performing
brain surgery over the phone.
-Law n is dying. Who is going to adjust the
sprinklers? If there is a drought and the
watering limitations kick in, w ho is handling
that? When the law n service fails to do the
job because you are not there, what is your
plan?
-Bill s are n 't paid and so service stops. Do you
have a complete checklist of all the bills for
the home you are leaving behind. Do you check
it off monthly to ensure no bill goes unpaid?
(That may explain w hy the lawn service isn't
doing their job ...J
-Leg al issues with the Home Ow ne rs
Association. utility companies, etc. Who is
your local point of contact to handle these
issues since you are gone a great distance,
and possibly out of the country?
HOW ARE YOU GRANTING HOUSE
ACCESS?
So who really gets the key?
Do you have a monthly pest service? Are
you going to just give them a key? (what
happens if they lose it, change employees, or
the Company is sold while you are gone??)
There are many reasons someone may need to

or
unoccupied
 
for more than 30 days, your
insurance
 
coverage
 
DECREASES!!

are

the house is For Sale, the
owner has moved to assisted
 
living,

of any kind

(from storms, golf balls,
rocks from mowers),
 
and all types
 
of
vandalism
 
are no longer covered and you
will not be reimbursed

insurance
 
company.

can be CANCELED!

Ship packages
 
to us!
We accept
 
all packages
using the address
 
on the
membership
 
cards
 
provided
in this
 
letter. If the item
requires
 
ground
 
trucking
 
due
to size or weight,
 
please
 
give
the shipper
 
our name
 
and
phone
 
number
 
so that we
can offload the item at your
	home.
Monthly
 
newsletter.
 
The "Your
 
Florida
 
HOME"
Newsletter
 
is published
 
monthly
 
and sent to the
address
 
where
 
you currently
 
reside.
 
As you change
locations,
 
we will change
 
the address.
 
The newsletter
is full of fun and ideas that will bring you peace
 
of
mind,
 
give you more time,
 
or make
 
you the hero with
your spouse.
After
 
Storm property
visits.
 
Anytime
 
the wind
exceeds
 
50 kts, power
 
is out
more
 
than 2 hours,
 
rain fall is
greater
 
than 4 inches
 
per
hour,
 
a tornado
 
is sighted
within
 
5 miles,
 
or a hurricane
 
hits, we initiate
 
our
"Post
 
Storm
 
Survey
 
Pian". We will contact
 
you when
this happen,
 
usually
 
via email or recorded
 
telephone,
depending
 
on the severity
 
of damage
 
to the area.
Emergency
 
Phone
 
calls
 
with
 
updates
Whenever
 
we need to communicate
 
with
 
all clients,
usually
 
due to storms
 
or other
 
local emergencies,
 
we
will use our "Emergency
 
Communications
 
System"
which
 
will use either
 
email or recorded
 
phone
messages.
 
In either
 
case, you will receive
 
updates
 
of
a general
 
nature.
 
We will personally
 
contact
 
you
 
if
there
 
are specific
 
property
 
issues
 
we need to talk
about.
Storm
 
Mitigation
 
Planning
 
We maintain
 
a
complete
 
set of items to stop further
 
damage
 
to
your property
 
in event
 
of storm
 
damage.
 
Roof
leaks,
 
shattered
 
windows
 
and other
 
damage
 
will
get temporary
 
repairs
 
as soon as we are able.
After
 
initial damage
 
control,
 
we will contact
 
you
with
 
recommendations
 
for repairs
 
or other
 
more
permanent
 
solutions.
Pre-Arrival
 
Grocery
 
Shopping
Want
 
your favorite
 
wine?
 
Breakfast
 
cereal,
 
milk
and eggs?
 
Before you arrive
 
(5 days notice works
best) we will shop for your
 
basic items
 
to a whole
list! You
 
pay only for the groceries!

Custom
 
Checklist

your own custom
 
'don't
 
forget
anything'
 
checklist
 
at
www.thehomewatchguy.com/checklistas
	you plan your
 
Florida
 
departure
 
as well as
your arrival.
 
Merely
 
check
 
the items
you want to remember
 
from the comprehensive
 
list and the
items you check
 
are instantly
 
mailed
 
to you ready to check
off!	
Missed
 
item shipping
 
service
Leave
 
something
 
behind?
 
It's a simple
email
 
or phone
 
call and we will expedite
 
it
to you. We can package
 
as well as ship, if
needed.
 
We usually
 
use Priority
 
Mail for
most
 
items but have
 
instant
 
access
 
to
UPS for larger items and those
 
requiring
tracking.
 
Cost varies
 
according
 
to
package.
Medical
 
Grade Freezer Monitor
Every freezer
 
in your home will receive
 
a
small
 
unobtrusive
 
monitoring
 
card, the
same
 
used in hospitals
 
and pharmacies
 
to
ensure
 
drugs
 
remain
 
cold. Our monitor
will alert when the freezer
 
has been
above
 
32F for more
 
than 2 hours,
ensuring
 
your food doesn't
 
defrost,
 
then
refreeze.

Hi, this is Mark
 
Mehling.
 
Right
 
now you are feeling
 
deep grief for
the
 
one you love.
 It is not the best time to be making
 
quick
decisions
 
about
 
real estate.
 
Although
 
selling the bouse
 
may be your
immediate
 
thought,
 
tbe housing
 
market
 
in Florida
 
is way down,
 
the
house
 
is full of memories
 
as well as personal
 
items,
 
and
you could save thousands
 
of dollars
 
with just
 
a
little time to evaluate
 
your
 
best options.
 
While
you catch
 
your
 
breath,
 
separating
 
the pain
from
 
financial
 
decisions,
 
you can bave the
home professionally
 
managed
 
for a small fee.
You gain time to think,
 
deal with
 
probate
 
or
other
 
legalities,
 
and
 
handle
 
the house decision
from
 
a little distance.
 
The
 
house,
 
meanwhile,
gets the professional
 
attention
 
it needs
 
to
survive
 
Florida
 
weather,
 
proper
 
upkeep
 
to
increase
 
its sale-ability,
 
and you have someone
you can call at anytime.
 
If you decide
 
to sell, I
can make
 
recommendations
 
about
 
real estate
agents,
 
moving
 
companies,
 
estate
 
sales, and
donations.
 
You can be involved
 
as much-
 
or as
little- as you like. The choices
 
are yours,
 
tbe
work
 
is mine.
Mark Mehling,
 
author
of the popular
 
book
"Leaving
 
Your Home-
ALONE"
Call me personally,
 
I can help- in total
confidence,
 
if needed.
 
Finally,
 
you can relax
knowing
 
that
 
one part
 
of the difficult
 
decisions
of life are
 
a whole lot easier.
HASTY HOUSE DECISIONS
 
COST BIG
 
$$$$
After saying goodbye
 
to your loved one, the next question
 
is always
"What will we do with the house?" You need time to think because
	quick decisions
 
now will cost you thousands
 
later. The house is full
of memories
 
and memorabilia.
 
Sell it? The market
 
is way down
 
riqht
now. And what about the contents?
 
Maybe keep it for a family
vacation
 
home- you may never have the chance to own a Florida
home again.
 
You need time
 
to consider
 
all the alternatives.
 
And
the house needs professional
 
care while it sits empty to keep it's
value- and valuable
 
contents-
 
free from mold and
 
other risks
 
not
covered
 
by homeowner's
 
insurance.
Put Time
 on Your Side, without
 
house
worries.
 
There is an alternative
 
that gives you
peace of mind.
 
Private home management
saves you money AND time- without
 
long term
contracts,
 
real estate agents and more
headaches.
 
Mark is an expert,
 
author, and
educator
 
with years of
 
experience
 
watching
empty homes. There
 
is no pressure,
 
he is your
personal
 
consultant
 
to guide you to the best
decision.
Relax, knowing
 
you have:

say:

in Arizona
 
wi

-- 533 of 624 --

Hi, this is Mark Mehling, author of "Leaving Your Home-ALONE", the
leading reference guide for absentee homeowners like you.
DID YOU COME HOME
TO A RUSlY DRYER?
Want to know the secret why?
You see, what is happening is very typical here in Florida. In my
new book, due out next summer called "Leaving your CONDO-ALONE" ,
I discuss just this problem. But I will let you in on a little section of the book
before it comes out for publication.
Did you come home from your wonderful summer up North only to find
water, or worse, rust, in the dryer in your beautiful Bella Vista condo? What
a shock! How aggravating! Did your clothes get rust stains? Will you
need to replace the dryer because the drum inside is now a mess? Are
other parts getting rusty, guaranteeing service calls, early failure, and
more surprises and expenses?
You have worked hard to afford the luxury of Bella Vista and don't need
these hassles and aggravations that eat up your time. Sitting around, waiting
for appliance people who promise to be there at 9 AM and then show up
promptly at 1130. You could have been walking on the beach but your day
was completely wasted. What is your time worth?
WARNING: A little Science here.
From the Draft copy:
"When you leave your condo empty for months at a time, (or you have an
untrained/inexperienced 'once a month' home watch service), the air inside your
closed dryer equalizes with the outside air through the vent hose which normally
exhausts the hot air. That means the super-humid hot air outside equalizes with the air
in the dryer drum. The cooler air in the condo keeps the metal drum cooler than the
humid air inside your dryer and you get (scientific info here!) the 'tee glass effect. ' Just
as a tea glass develops moisture, or condensates, on the warmer side of the ice cold
drink glass, the moisture condensates on the warm side of the dryer drum- inside.
This moisture can cause rust, ruin your nice clothes, cause early failure of the
appliance, and make you the repairman's best customer.
How can you prevent this from happening? You probably don't see this happening
when you are living in the unit, do you? That's because you routinely use the
appliance. If you ensure that the appliance is run for at least 10 minutes every other
533
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 534 of 624 --

week, you will never have the problem. The heat from the dryer will remove any moist
air inside the drum and exhaust it. Once the drum is dry, ensure the door is left open to
allow lower humidity condo air to circulate inside the drum. This solution eliminates
inline doors, flappers, and 'socks' that can clog from dryer dust or need changing at
regular intervals, too." (I go on to describe how to keep the dryer light from burning out but
that is for another time.)
Now this solution does require you ensure these three critical elements:
./ the humidity is kept low in the condo while you are gone
./ someone is checking on the property more than once a month
./ they use a tailored checklist that ensures this check is done each time
My private home management clients do not have this problem. Why? Very simply because
our service ensures this doesn't happen. We know what the issue is based on years of
experience and make it a 'non-issue' for our clients. Our exclusive 101 point checklist is
tailored by an author, educator, and expert to match YOUR individual unit. With the
precision of a commercial pilot, our checklists eliminate hundreds of potential problems just
like this one.
If you would like to stop worrying about your investment, stop coming home to surprises, and
stop being the embarassed by problems you could have solved, give me a call.
Want an eye popping experience? You can get an ABSOLUTELY FREE, no-obligation "WOW,
I never knew THAT!" survey of potential problems in your condo just for being a Bella Vista
Owner. It is my gift to you to celebrate the beginning of our 5th year in business. You get the
results and choose how you want to handle any issues, if at all. There is absolutely no
obligation- nothing will be sold, and I will even show you how to fix anything we find.
But hurry, this offer ends November 1st, 2010.
For more information, you can visit us online at www.theHomeWatchGuy.com or via
email at mark@homewatchvalet.com or call my personal cell at 386-212-6770. We are also
available toll-free at 888- HW -VALET (888-498-2538) for your convenience.
Mark the HomeWatchGuy
