for you to apply for the most respected and prestigious home management service available to people
who travel extensively or snowbird.
The HomeWatchValet Club is the perfect example of the old adage, "You get what you pay/or."
For example, you get a truly impressive array of extra privileges, all designed for your convenience and
Peace of Mind:
-Privacy. A single personal Valet will be the one person routinely in your home. No worries
about the neighbors (or their kids) routing around in your things while you are gone.
-Your Own Valet. A single point of contact, your personal valet, not some generic phone
number or whoever happens to answer the phone. Your Valet, an individual you will meet
and know personally, will provide you unparalleled service. He or she will be able to handle
your smallest worry or concern. They are accountable to me, so you will also receive my
personal cell number to immediately resolve an issue.
-Premium Service/limited Enrollment. We only accept a limited number of clients to ensure
this premium service exceeds our Clubmember's expectations. No request is burdensome,
and you never impose.
-Trustworthy/Reliable Service. Scheduled visits to your empty property by your licensed,
bonded, and trained Valet. Unlike maids, pet sitters, or even friends and neighbors, your
Valet is part of a proven system that has saved others thousands of dollars in heartburn and
headaches, allowing you to spend your time doing things you love, like golf bridge, or
philanthropy.

everything prepared for your arrival. Plan on unpacking- everything else is handled by your
Valet to ensure you don't miss your tee time!

-- 539 of 624 --

DEFINITIONS:
The COMPANY should have enough insurance to cover the potential risk to your
home. $100,000 can disappear quickly if the screw up and mold enters your
home. Itemized electronic bills, a website, and handling credit cards is what any
professional business invests to provide customer service to their client. Without
these, who knows what the rest of their care will look like in your absence.
A PROFESSIONAL knows that time is money- yours and his. He should be
respectful of your time, be organized when he comes, and be prepared in
advanced. A logo'd shirt indicates a commitment to the business. Car signs
should be visible in case your neighbors wonder who is going into your home
when you are gone. Remember that a raggedy looking person with a vehicle
that scares the neighbors is probably taking care of your property the same
way. As far as a service agreement or contract, remember Roy Rogers
famous saying "A verbal contract isn't worth the paper it's written on."
Professional tools includes a high grade humidity sensor, temperature
sensors, certified smoke to test smoke alarms, etc. A plan for your home
should include a minimum of two visits per month using checklists
customized for your specific property.
A KNOWLEDGEABLE Company or individual knows exactly what happens to
the homeowners Insurance policy after the property has been vacant for 30
days. There should also be a simple easy to understand mitigation plan for
damage when and if it does occur. What will they do for a broken window?
Leaking roof? Broken water line? Hurricane or tornado?
Actual MANAGEMENT OF THE HOUSE is the most critical area other than
the Company itself. An outside sign, similar to those used by a security
company, should have a toll free number to call if anyone sees a problem-
like your friends or neighbors or even someone walking a dog. Without a
sign, who would they call when you are unavailable? Free Grocery shopping
makes your home-coming easier. Lost keys could be an issue and you need
to know who is going to pay to re-key ALL YOUR LOCKS should this occur.
Some services include visits after major storms but be sure to ask the
definition for 'major storm'.
OTHER SERVICES should be available to make your arrival easier. Why
should you have to be in the property all days waiting for carpet cleaning,
window cleaners, or pressure washers? Besides, if there is a leak or other
damage, the service will need these people to help with the cleanup. They need
to guarantee the work of anyone they hire, instead of you being saddled with
problems when you come home. Specialized home plans should be available
for year round management, 'for sale' properties, etc to demonstrate this is a
thriving, reliable, trusted by others service. If you haven't done an Insurance
Accepted Home Inventory, the service should offer a professional service or a
DIY kit at a reasonable rate.

Port Orange, Florida/
 
Homeowner's
 
have
been hit with skyrocketing
 
insurance
premiums,
 
and many insurers
 
are moving out.
Those that remain
 
easily terminate
 
policies
when they see additional
 
risk ofloss.
A local author,
 
recognized
 
as one of
America's
 
Premier
 
Experts®,
 
is on a
mission
 
to save homeowners
 
from canceled
insurance
 
policies. "Snowbirds
 
leaving homes
behind
 
can have their insurance
 
terminated"
he warns.
 
Why? Simply because
 
the unwary
owner leaves the property
 
unoccupied
 
for
more than 30 days.
	Mark Mehling,
 
author
 
of the book
"Leaving
 
Yom' Home-ALONE"
 
is a
pioneer
 
in the field of private home
management.
 
We asked him some questions:
"Why haven't
 
I heard
 
this before?
Mehling:
 
"Most agents
 
don't
 
want to tell
their
 
customers
 
that their coverage
DECREASES when they leave and their
	insurance
 
could be cancelled.
 
So they just
hope nothing
 
happens
 
and the home
 
office
doesn't
 
ask questions."
Florida
 
insurance
 
is harder
 
to get
every
 
day,
 
can they
 
really
 
terminate
my policy?	
Mehling:
 
"Absolutely,
 
unless you have a
licensed
 
and insured
 
home watch service that
provides
 
you with a 'due diligence'
 
statement,
many companies
 
are more than happy to
lower their risk by terminating
 
even long term
customers.
 
Ignorance
 
is no longer
 
accepted."
What
 
about
 
having
 
my
 
house
 
cleaner
or neighbors
 
watch
 
the house?
Mehling:
 
"Maids, pet sitters,
 
and neighbors
are not licensed/insured
 
home watch
businesses
 
and do not qualify by your home
owner's
 
insurance
 
standards.
 
So your
insurance
 
can be canceled.
 
Besides, would you'
let your bouse
 
cleaner
 
manage your half
million dollar retirement
 
portfolio
 
for six
months
 
while you are gone? Of course not,
you use a professional
 
for that,
 
and your
house deserves the same because
 
it is just as
valuable."

hy would someone
d me headache pills?"

se
· Leslie,
· g here and these are
om doesn'f need
_...__o_e- let me explain. Mark Mehling, author
of the book "Leaving
Your Home-ALONE"
Leslie, Are you like my Mom?
mother is a wonderful woman, who put up with some of the most
- credib'le stunts from yours truly. On top of all the laundry, dishes and
cooking that kept my three brothers and me ready for anything growing up- I
never realized everything she did and what a blessing it was until I moved
out on my own.
But my mother never knew the intricacies of running a household from a
maintenance and BILL PAYING point of view. And everything seemed to
en Dad was gone. While Mom,could handle the everyday issues, it all depended on
a ces, vehicles, air conditioner WORKING right and the bills getting paid. She had no
- ea wbat to do about the car, changing the oil. car batteries. garage door openers, air
·oners,_garbage disposals, lawn care, insect control, etc. The appliances were
posed to work!! There weren't SUPPOSEDto be BUGS!! Sorting and paying all THOSE
S was quite overwhelming. "Wait until Dad gets home" kept her going for years. But when
my Father wasn't there, she was completely at a loss as to what to do-these problems just
gave her a HUGE HEADACHE (thus the pills you have above)!!! But it wasn't her fault.
Bills need paying, Properties need maintenance
Organizing bills, getting help with 'honey-do's', and everyday care of your property means
items need constant minor tweaking to make sure they last longer. Appliances need
maintenance, cars need oil changes, tire rotations, and routine servlcinq, lawns need spraying,
bug problems need attention. The list was endless and just added stress to my Mom. That got
me to thinking. Mom needed ~

-- 545 of 624 --

SUPER SIMPLE MARKETING TRICK
Will Increase the Lifetime Value of Every Customer, Get More
Referrals, and Take Less than an Hour a Month to Implement!
TRUE STORY - 18 months ago I met a Personal Injury Attorney from Atlanta who wanted to mail out a
monthly print newsletter to just over 3,000 former clients and Chiropractors that have practices in his area.
He told me they currently get few referrals and almost no repeat clients, even though he knew for sure his
clients were very happy with his service.
So I said, “If people are happy with you and your firm, why are they not referring and/or doing business with
you again?” And, very matter of fact, he replied, “Because they can’t remember my name.” Recently he had
done a survey of 200 former clients who had won or settled a case with his firm between 6 and 18 months
ago, and ONLY 26 of them knew who his firm was when they called. When they can’t remember your name,
it is hard for them to refer friends and family to do business with you again.
Fast forward 18 months, The Newsletter Pro has now been creating, printing, and mailing a monthly
newsletter to all the firm’s former clients. When this same attorney looked at his referrals and repeat
business for the previous 12 months, he found that 32% of his new clients are now repeat clients or referred
clients from former clients. His newsletter is now the single highest ROI marketing piece for the firm.
This is just one of dozens of stories we have from clients who have implemented a monthly print newsletter
only to turn around and discover that it’s the single best piece of marketing in their arsenal.
You already know that a print newsletter is a must for any business, you may even be sending a generic
newsletter now, but you’ve always wanted to send a custom newsletter. At The Newsletter Pro we know how
to create custom newsletters that get results. Our newsletters get opened and read, increase the lifetime
value of your customers, help you get more referrals, and only requires one hour or less a month of your
input - but sounds like you wrote the whole thing!
To help you get started with your own newsletter, I have put
together our best offer EVER! If you get started with newsletters for
your company by Halloween, you’ll receive three very special treats:
Treat 1 : $500 gift certificate good towards your first month’s newsletter creation and printing.
Treat 2 : FREE 5 day 4 night cruise for two. One of the biggest reasons stated as to why
someone wants to become an entrepreneur, is the ability to take great vacations. We want to help with
that goal by giving you a gift certificate towards a free cruise!
Treat 3 : No Postage Increase In 2014 - The post office recently requested a minimum of a $0.03
increase in postage from the governing body. When you get started with newsletters, we will lock in the
current postage rate for all of 2014. While three cents doesn’t sound like a lot, it can add up quickly when
you are mailing 500 to a few thousand newsletters per month.
545
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

your questions answered.
Shaun Buck

-- 547 of 624 --

Ninja Newsletter Technique gets a 24% response rate and makes
your printed newsletter go viral!
How would you like to be able to make sure your clients are actively engaged in your
newsletter and have proof of it?
Want a way to get a 24% response to your monthly list?
How would you like to have your newsletter actually go viral?
We wanted a way to make our newsletter readers actively engage with us when they read the newsletter instead of
just passively reading it and then throwing it away. We wanted a way to make it more fun and have our clients
desire our newsletters every month. So we put a “Word Find” activity into our newsletter, but instead of using
someone else’s “Word Find” we made our own. We used MS Excel and simply put the words into it ourselves, but
our secret ninja technique was to use words associated with our product. So this teaches our clients about the
terminology of the industry as well as giving them a good feeling about our services. We have a 24% rate of
engagement with this activity and each month we change it to reflect what is going on with us. We also give them a
reward for responding to it. We typically use gift cards that we get from reward points from our vendors and
creditors so there is only a minimal cost to us to do this for our clients.
There are some major advantages we get when our client fills in the information. One of them is that we get updated
contact information and it also lets us know they are still actively involved with us. Another is that we get an email
address where we may have not had one. And lastly, and this one is huge – The newsletter grows our list. You see
when our client fills in the word find and goes to the fax machine, their co-workers want to find out what the
excitement is all about and so they start to talk about getting a $10.00 gift card from one of their vendors. So as
soon as the first fax is sent to us, the other employee grabs the word find, scratches out the other persons name
and fills it in for himself and then sends us another fax. So now we have a newsletter that becomes viral and we
get to grow our client contact list.
547
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

3-Step "Decoder" Campaign - Letter
From Ron Ipach:
FROM RON IPACH
This is the 3-step campaign that our clients use to attract new customers to their shops.
The 'hook' is the coded message that requires the reader to bring in the letter or postcard and place it
under the special decoder at the repair shop in order to reveal their prize.
Our clients have seen as much as an 11% response to this campaign.

SERVICE
Service Business Customer Newsletter
FROM RON IPACH
From Ron Ipach:
This is a copy of a newsletter that we customize for our clients that kicks butt for several reasons:
• 	It doesn't focus on just one topic! What the business owner 'does' for a living is NOT
interesting to the reader Just imagine a pest control owner sending out a newsletter all
about creepy crawly bugs - yuk!) If it bores the recipient, future issues will be thrown
away unread. There is always something in it that everyone can relate to.
• 	It's sent out monthly to ensure 'top of the mind' awareness
• 	It's a great delivery system for offers - it's a welcome break from the 'buy from me'
messages that their customers have become used to
• 	Best of all, the newsletter is done for the business owner - freeing up dozens of hours of
marketing work each month

www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

Celebrating Independence
Day At Home
Traffic is heavy. parks are crowded and friends would
rather celebrate at your place.
The Fourth ofJuly is a great day to stay home. The time
is right because your spring work is done. The deck, patio
and yard should be in great shape for all to see. They provide
the backdrop for an enjoyable day.
\Vhether you plan a barbecue for family and a few others
or a real party outdoors, a few decorations can add color to
the festivities. Generally. they are inexpensive theme pieces
available at party stores. And you could ask guests to wear
red, white, and blue.
Food, music. games and fireworks are basic.
No need to break
the bank buying
steaks and fancy
foods. Everyone likes
hamburgers and hot
dogs. For a simple
party. add potato
chips, beans, a salad
or two. fresh finger
vegetables with veggie dip, a dessert and plenty of cool
drinks.
Or try a firec-racker salad with strawberries ·in red gelatin,
whipped cream on top1 and blueberries on the whipped cream
for red, white and blue. Poke in a celery stick.
Provide outdoor activities. After dark, play safe with the
fireworks.

Put Pennies And Nickels Back Into
Circulation, Please!
Because of high copper prices, it now costs the U.S. Mint
1.3 cents to make a penny and 7.7 cents for a nickeL
[tis estimated that there are some 150 billion coins going
unused. That's about $90 per house standing in jars and loose
in drawers and sofa cushions.
According to the Sustainable Research 	-. 	( J>--
Group, there would be big environmental \ 	~~ 	-
benefits if just l 0 percent of donnant 	~
coins were re-circulated. 	l~"' 	\Water savings at the mint would 	- 	+
be equal to abo~t 82 million showers. 	~
Energy savings could light 4.1 million
bulbs for 1,000 hours each C02 emissions equal to those from
12,619 cars would be kept out of the atmosphere.
Check The Back Seat Before
Leaving The Car
Certainly you would never intentionally leave a baby, child
or pet locked in the car when the weather is hot, or anvtime.
Within I 0 minutes, the temperature in a car can cause.heat
stroke.
But you could be very busy or preoccupied. A sleeping
child in the back seat could be forgotten. The CDC recommends
placing a stuffed animal on the front seat to help you remember.
Always check to see that eve1yone is out of the car before
leaving it.
Leave pets at home. Move your pet into the air conditioned
house or at least move them into the shade. Be sure there is
plenty of water available.

Professor's 'The Last Lecture' Tells
A Story About How To Live
lt's not unusual for retiring professors to give a last lecture.
When Carnegie Mellon University!s Randy Pausch gave his. he
wasn't retiring. He was dying of pancreatic cancer.
His now famous lecture was viewed by millions on
YouTube. It inspired many to follow Pausch's advice about
what is important in life. Now he has a book The Last Lecture
(Hyperion), with co-author Jeffrey Zaslow.
The father of three small children. Pausch said in a USA
Today interview. "I was trying to put myself in a bottle that
would one day wash up on the beach for my children." From
his lecture, Achieving Your Childhood Dreams, here are a few
of his points about life:
* Never underestimate the importance of having fun. I'm
dying and I'm having fun every day because there's no other
way to play it.
* Experience is what you ge-t -when you didn't get what you
wanted.
*No one is pure eviL Find the best in everybody. Wait
long enough and people will surprise you.
* It's not about achieving your dreams but about living
your life. If you live the right way, the dreams will come.
*We can't change the cards we're dealt, just how we play
the hand.
* Jn an interview with amazon.com. Pausch says the thing
he learned as he grew older was that you can't get anywhere
without help. Ask yourself: What kind of person do people
want to help'? Then you'll know the answer to: What kind of
person should I try to be?
* Healing what other people say about you is important to
your success and happiness.
His book is humorous while allowing him to tell of his life
experiences and the lessons he learned. For one: The secret of
winning the stuffed animal on the midway, like most anything
else, is sheer persistence. But it helps to have long arms and
discretionary income.
Good Advice For College Freshmen
And Their Parents
School will start in a few \Veeks, but it's not too late to help
your college freshman avoid poor choices. Student
development offices give this advice:
v' 	Give yourself a break when signing up for classes. Don't
overload your schedule. Get used to social and academic
demands on your time.
Buy the books. You will save money by buying used
books. but new books can be sold later. A void book
sharing. Always have a book of your own.
Plan to study at least an hour for each hour in class. Some
courses require more. lt's not like high school.
Check your email at least once a day so you won't miss
notices from professors or campus~ wide messages.
A void committing a certain number of hours to an outside
job until after the first week of classes. By then you'll have
a better idea about how much you can do and still keep up
with your studies.
./ 	Ask for help when you need it. There are math and \.Vriting
labs, peer tutoring, and workshops. Or talk with your
professor during office hours. Many freshman need extra
help.
Keep socializing in balance with study requirements.
Focusing completely on study can create a lonely or
depressing college experience. Make time to socialize and
study.
Stay positive. You can do it.
Don't feel pressured to choose a career in your freshman
year .
./ 	Take time to discover your strengths and where your true
interests and talents lie. Consider the possibilities. A visit
to the campus career office can help. But sign up for some
offbeat classes just because they interest you. Never can
tel! where you will find inspiration.
Dettling For The Tax Rebates
The National Retail Foundation estimates that purchases
generated from tax rebate checks will come to $42.9 billion.
Big-box chains and other retailers want a piece of the action
and are wi IIing to pay for it.
Sears Holdings (Sears. Kmart. Lands' End and others) is

July Fourth Potato Salad
./ 	2 cups boiled red potatoes with skin left on
./ 	2 cups of boiled small white potatoes with skin left on
../ 	2 hardboiled eggs cut in small pieces
1 tablespoon celery seed
l/2 cup blue cheese crumbles
./ 	3 tablespoons light mayonnaise
l/2 cup natural yogurt
1 tablespoon sugar
./ 	5 tablespoons horseradish
./ 	6 tablespoons chipotle mustard
1 tablespoon of white vinegar
l teaspoon fresh ground pepper
112 teaspoon of salt
1/2 cup chives or bacon
bits for garnish
Mix together and enjoy'

Life's Little Truths
;;p 	Age is a high price to pay for maturity.
® 	Mv idea of housework: Sweep the room with a glance.
1$- 	N~t one shred of evidence supports the notion that life is
serious.
#II 	If you look like your passport picture, you probably need
the trip,
~;~~ Artificial intelligence is no match for natural stupidity.
Itt 	No husband has ever been shot while doing the dishes.
0 	Opportunities always look bigger going than coming.
$' 	Junk is something you've kept for years and throw away
three weeks before you need it.
t> 	It is easier to get forgiveness than permission .
~ 	Experience is wonderful. It enables you to recognize a
mistake when you make it.
'iW 	By the time you can make ends meet, they move the ends.
(; 	Thou shaH not weigh more than thy refrigerator.
~ 	Someone who thinks logically is a nice contrast to the real
world.

COPYRIGHT-FREE
Real Estate
The "3-Step Giorgio Letters" For Real Estate Agents Letter #1
"You can't trust water: Even a straight stick
turns crooked in it." -W .C. Fields
Photo
<Insert Date>
Dear <Insert Name>,
Through all her many trials and terrors, one thing kept Dorothy focused.
She wanted to go home.
There's something magical about home. It's where we experience in all their richness the
precious moments, memories and relationships that matter so much.
"Home" equals "Life ."
So, of course, when the time comes to consider moving on , there's much more than just
"number" to factor into the equation . You're leaving a big part of YOU behind .
And what makes this even harder is the entire process of selling and buying a home is way
more complex than ever before.
Cable TV is packed with shows on real estate: flipping houses, home repair, dream homes,
nightmare homes, vacation homes ... it makes it all seem to simple, but in reality, this endless
stream of conflicting image and messaging only makes the task of selling your home for a price
that's right for you so much more difficult.
If you're feeling overwhelmed , it's perfectly natural and understandable.
But fortunately, I have got a SOLUTION!
With this letter, YOU are entitled to receive my new book: <lnse rt Book Title.> It's new. It's
timely. And it provides simple tips (or "hacks") that you - no matter how busy you are - can use
immediately to get the absolute top dollar for your home no matter what condition the current
real estate market is in.
Here's just a taste of what you' ll discover when you grab your copy:
570
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 571 of 624 --

• 	How to stage your home to look like a million dollars without breaking the bank.
• 	The tax write-off every home seller should take, but almost nobody does.
• 	A secret negotiating strategy that can get your buyer to up their offer by 10%.
• 	Why re-doing your kitchen could be the WORST thing you can do before selling.
• 	And a lot more besides!
Again, it's packed with valuable strategies I GUARANTEE you won't find anywhere else -
PLUS, they're all easy to use, understand and profit from.
Now, I only have a limited run of print copies on hand and available, so it's important to let me
know as soon as possible. Just give me a call at <Insert Phone Number> and I'll get a copy sent
to you right away.
Looking forward to helping you make the home of your dreams a reality.
Stephane Summers
<Insert Title>
<Insert phone number & website URL>
P.S. The cost? This book is entirely my gift to you, no strings attached. All I ask is that you let
me know you're interested and I' ll shit it to you right away - no questions asked .

Real Estate
The "3-Step Giorgio Letters" For Real Estate Agents Letter #2
Photo
<Insert Date>
Dear <Insert First Name>,
"A Penny Saved Is a Penny Earned."
-Ben Franklin
<Insert Three Shiny Pennies>
COPYRIGHT-FREE
As you can see, I've attached 3 shiny pennies to this letter. I've done this for two important
reasons: first, to grab your attention for just a moment or two or three. Second, to remind you of
that important quote from Ben Franklin, "A penny saved is a penny earned. "
Of course, back in Ben's day, a penny was worth a bit more than now .. . even so, the principle
still holds true. You don't let value slip from your fingers willy-nilly. And that's why I'm sending
you this, your second notice .. . consider it your "Maximizing Home Equity Wake Up" call from
me, your Residential Property Analyst.
It is a stress-filled, busy, hectic, tough, tiring, demanding, mind-numbing energy-sapping battle
each and every day out there, isn't it? I know - after all , my days are packed with my business
too. It is easy, tempting, even natural to come home to "the cave" after a day of doing battle,
shove the rock onto the doorway, and collapse on the couch.
BUT WITHOUT TAKING A PRO-ACTIVE ROLE IN Y OUR HOME SALE, YOUR ABILITY TO
GET THE VERY BEST DEAL POSSIBLE FLIES LIKE A BIRD OUT THE WINDOW.
But never fear, Stephanie to the rescue!!! You know, I am disappointed that I didn't hear from
you after my first letter to get my new book <Insert Book Title>. And best of all, I'm offering to
you totally FREE, just call me at <Insert Phone number> and ask.
But I'm back again, this time with an EVEN BETTER INVITATION .. . a truly remarkable offer .. .
When you get my book, I' ll also toss in for free two tickets to my upcoming LIVE training taking
place on <Insert Date> where I'll walk you through every one of these 10 hacks in detail -
answering your questions and providing additional information that's not even in the book.
Heck, when you show up, I' ll even pick up the tab for a tasty dinner as well. All you need to do
is call.

Basic 3-Letter "Plant The Farm Sequence" - Letter 1
Photo
Dear <First Name>,
For Richfield Neighbor:
A FREE <Insert Free Gift Offer/Widget>
is reserved for YOU!
All I ask in return is a chance
to say "Hello."
COPYRIGHT-FREE
My name is Sam Smith, and I am an Auto Sales Professional with <insert number> years'
experience, at Quality Dealership Inc., specializing in Richfield. (My Personal Brochure is
enclosed .)
Many of your neighbors are already my clients. In Fact, as you drive down your street, it's a
very safe bet that some of your neighbor's garages and driveways contain a new or pre-owned
automobile that I put there. Now I've set a simple goal of at least personally meeting and
shaking hands with EVERY Richfield resident.
For that reason , I've had a very special <insert free gift offer> prepared as my FREE
GOODWILL GIFT for you and your family, and I'd like to drop it by, at your convenience.
I promise not to try and "sell" you a thing!
Just call me at <insert telephone number> and let's set a time when I can swing by, drop off
your gift, shake hands and say, "Hello."
Hopefully, when the time comes for you to make a change in automobiles, you' ll remember me
and give me the opportunity of being of service by calling me at <insert telephone number>.
Thanks,
Sam Smith
<Insert company>, <Insert title>
<insert phone number & website URL>
P.S. A page of comments about me from some of my clients is also enclosed or you can view
them on my Facebook page at <insert your Facebook page URL>.

Dear <First Name>,
IS THERE ANY REAL
DIFFERENCE BETWEEN
One Automobile Salesperson
And Another?
YOUR FREE GIFT IS WAITING
COPYRIGHT-FREE

important "financial facts" you ought to know about.
#1: l'M SORRY TO REPORT-YOUR "APPRECIATION" HAS "STALLED."
The houses in your neighborhood are no longer in creasing in va lu e . When you bought your house, you DID
make a good investment. But now, that investment has peaked in value. The only way you can keep on
using real estate to build your financial security is by moving up to a new home.
(We'll be happy to give you a copy of the detailed analysis that shows what is happening to the "stalled"
value of your home and why, free, just for the asking .)
#2:ruGHTNOW,WEHAVEBEAUTIFULHOMESINHUDSONTHATYOUCANMOVEUPTOBUT
KEEP VIRTUALLY THE SAME MORTGAGE PAYMENT!
That's right - We 've determined that YOU have the opportunity to move up to a new Hudson home ... a
home that is INCREASING IN VALUE much faster than the one yo u're in right now... and, considering the
equity value you've accumulated in your present home, you' ll be able to keep your monthly mortgage
payment about the same. MORE VALUE BUT NOT MORE MONEY!
Of course, these opportun iti es are LIMITED and MOVING FAST. If this is of any interest to you at all, you
should look into it immediatel y.
I've enclosed some information about Hudson. But, you really need to to ur this wonderful community and
some of the luxury homes themselves to fu ll y appreciate how good an opportunity this is. I'll be glad to give
you that tour at your convenience, no obligation, and - I PROMISE - no pressure.
#3 : NO NEED TO "DISRUPT" YOUR LIFE.

out of school, or, in any way, disrupt your life ... your new, faster-appreciating home is just down the st reet!

Dear <First Name>,
Please Don't Take Your Biggest
And Most Important Investment
For Granted
COPYRIGHT-FREE
For most people, the homes they live in are their biggest and most important investments - and future
financial independence depends on the real estate ownership. However, the days when you could buy
just about any home, live in it for 30 years or so, and count on it being a great investment are long since
gone ... and YOUR home is a prime example of this, because THE APPRECIATION IN YOUR HOME
IS VIRTUALLY "STALLED."
Two years ago, every time you made a monthly mortgage payment, you were also making a terrific
investment.
But right now, this month that's no longer true. And it may not be in the future either. That's why some
smart Riverview owners are using an "equity move" to acquire a beautiful NEW home in next-door
Hudson ... getting more value ... a property that IS increasing steadily in value ... but, still keeping about
the same mortgage payment. I know this may sound "harsh" - but aren't you neglecting your
responsibility to your financial security and your family's financial security by NOT investigating this?
But, I know there's also the "emotional side ." Maybe you and your family just love your present home,
and I can sure understand that - but, maybe you'd fall in love all over again with one of these full-
featured, beautiful new homes in Hudson, too. (Why not take a look-see?)
